title: 李家超：香港會續為大灣區建設貢獻力量　與廣東深化機制對接
news_content:
行政長官李家超表示，今年是國家「十五五」規劃開局之年，特區政府定當積極引領社會各界，主動對接「十五五」規劃，現正全力全速制定香港第一個五年規劃，推動香港更好融入和服務國家發展大局，鞏固拓展香港優勢，提升香港的競爭力，為各行各業帶來經濟利益。

李家超在香港梅州聯會活動視像致辭，指香港會繼續為粵港澳大灣區建設貢獻力量，與廣東一起深化規則銜接和機制對接，促進人流、物流、資金流、數據流跨境便捷流動；也會以創新模式，提速發展北部都會區建設，尤其是河套香港園區，吸引龍頭企業和優秀人才匯聚其中，帶動多元產業百花齊放，加強與廣東的產學研協同發展，認為相關工作需要社會各界一同前行，同鄉社團更是不可或缺的夥伴。

李家超說，期望聯會憑藉深厚鄉親網絡，發揮橋樑作用，推動兩地深化多領域合作，助力抓緊「十五五」時期的機遇，融入和服務國家發展大局。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 粉嶺有屋苑食水混濁　水務署稱沉積物主要是食水內礦物質
news_content:
水務署表示接獲報告，粉嶺華明邨、華心邨、和合石一帶屋苑疑似出現食水混濁情況。署方初步懷疑是進行水管工程時操作水掣，因水壓變化揚起水管內的沉積物，主要是食水內的礦物質，並非瀝青引致。

水務署在社交專頁表示，已即時採取應對措施，全面沖洗受影響屋苑一帶的政府喉管，供水正逐步回復清澈 。署方正為受影響用戶提供臨時食水，包括至少5架水車及40個水箱，並與屋苑的管理公司保持聯絡，有需要時向他們提供技術支援，包括跟進清洗屋苑食水水缸，亦已建議大廈為水缸換水，住戶可把水龍頭開動片刻，待來水回復清澈才使用。

水務署表示會持續跟進情況，亦正就事件與北區民政事務處、房屋署、當區區議員及關愛隊緊密聯繫，為有需要的居民提供適切支援。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 美股初段個別發展
news_content:
美股初段個別發展。

道瓊斯指數較早時報51189點，升110點，升幅0.22%。

納斯達克指數報27013點，跌73點，跌幅0.27%。

標準普爾500指數報7591點，跌8點，跌幅0.11%。



編輯：李意琴

title: Hop On's bid to delay owners' meeting rejected
news_content:
The Lands Tribunal on Tuesday rejected a request by the management company appointed to oversee Wang Fuk Court affairs to postpone an owners’ meeting.

Responding to inquiries, the Home Affairs Department said Hop On Management will try its best to facilitate a meeting and safeguard the rights of all homeowners.

The department stressed that Hop On has been carrying out its duties according to the law, and that it had sought to delay the meeting mainly because it needed more time to carry out relevant preparatory work.

It added that the government will study the ruling which touched on the interpretation of the Building Management Ordinance.

The tribunal pointed to difficulties in issuing meeting notices and holding meetings, and recognised efforts by the Home Affairs Department and Hop On in this regard, according to the department.


Edited by Edmond Fong

title: 伊朗革命衛隊：將保持最高級別軍事戒備狀態
news_content:
伊朗伊斯蘭革命衛隊發言人穆赫比表示，伊朗已做好應對所有可能情況的準備，軍事要塞將保持最高級別的戒備狀態。

穆赫比說，美國關於伊朗軍事能力被削弱的說法不實，當前伊朗武裝力量的戰備水平比以往更高，伊方對敵人的進攻和防禦裝備、欺騙手段及作戰方式的了解，比以往更清晰。停火期間，伊朗的軍事和作戰能力有所提升。

穆赫比又說，美國投入大量兵力，試圖在霍爾木茲海峽實現美方想達成的局面，但最終未能實現目標，強調伊朗對海峽的控制從未削弱。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 瑞典回港父母涉疏忽照顧兒童　社署正向法庭申請保護令
news_content:
一對港人父母幾年前在芬蘭誕下女兒其後移居瑞典，女兒被瑞典有關部門強制看管。兩人其後回港在家誕下另一名兒子，但未取到認可身份證明。警方在長沙灣以「疏忽照顧兒童罪」將兩人拘捕。社署表示，已將男嬰護送到醫院接受檢查及評估，並正向法庭申請保護令，以保障他的福祉。

社署回覆查詢說，十分關注事件，保護家庭及兒童服務課一直與相關部門緊密聯繫，並採取聯合行動；並與相關人士進行多專業會議，以兒童的最佳利益和身心健康為首要考慮，為他訂定合適的福利計劃。

該名父親傍晚被警方押送，乘七人車離開長沙灣警署，前往位於荔枝角一間旅館搜證。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 居深水埗男子染登革熱留醫內地　潛伏期在港列本地感染
news_content:
衞生防護中心透過聯防聯控機制，接獲內地衞生當局通報一宗登革熱個案。病人目前身處內地，正在當地留醫，情況穩定，但潛伏期一直在香港，中心將個案列為本地感染個案，正聯同政府多個部門採取適當防控措施。
 
患者是一名有長期病患的67歲男子。他上月24日出現皮疹，26日出現發燒、頭暈及肌肉痛，同日到明愛醫院急症室求診。因發燒持續，他三日後再到私家診所求醫，病徵一直輕微。他與家人昨日前往內地，期間因身體不適到當地醫院求醫，血液樣本經內地衞生當局檢驗後，證實對登革熱病毒呈陽性反應。

初步調查顯示，病人居於深水埗基隆街，已退休。潛伏期內沒有外遊，日常主要在居所附近活動，包括通州街公園和北河街街市，近期沒有印象曾在香港被蚊叮咬，他的四名家居接觸者現時沒有出現病徵。

中心表示，根據食環署的白紋伊蚊監測數據，深水埗及石硤尾的分區誘蚊器指數為26.2%。相比去年，今年誘蚊器指數上升的情況較早出現。發言人說，由於病人在發病後曾在深水埗一帶活動，明日起將於深水埗「安心社區樓宇支援中心」設立健康站，為出現症狀市民評估，並進行免費登革熱抗體檢測。
 


編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 老虎國際：下星期五起暫停客戶境內交易新開倉　只支持賣出及平倉
news_content:
內地傳媒報道，老虎國際將對存量投資者帳戶在中國境內的服務進行相應調整，以落實兩年集中整治期的行業監管要求，推動跨境證券業務規範發展。

公司表示，下星期五開始，針對在境內交易服務，暫停股票等所有品種的新開倉、加倉交易，只支持賣出、平倉操作；針對在境內資金劃轉服務，暫停資金轉入，轉出功能保持正常，全力保障客戶資金安全。

公司又表示，今次調整不會影響為存量投資者在境外提供服務，也不影響全體客戶現有資產安全，客戶可正常查詢帳戶、持有及賣出已有持倉。

中國證監會上月公布，對老虎、富途及長橋證券，因非法跨境展業，違反法規等立案調查，計劃沒收3間公司境內外相關主體全部違法所得，並依法嚴厲處罰。

當局又公布方案，設置兩年集中整治期，清理相關境外機構非法存量業務。



編輯：李意琴

title: 北京今年防汛形勢複雜嚴峻　加強監測預報預警
news_content:
北京市應急管理局黨委委員、副局長李宇表示，從氣象預測和歷史規律來看，今年北京防汛形勢複雜嚴峻、不容樂觀，包括極端天氣多發頻發，城市防洪承壓明顯，山洪地質災害風險突出，暑期旅遊人流、城市通勤流量大，形容首都防汛面臨多重考驗。

李宇指出，北京市加強監測預報預警，與冀、晉、蒙2900多個氣象站輿情的信息共享，切實做好防汛隱患排查檢查，提升信息化系統決策、避險轉移等能力。

他呼籲市民和各行各業要密切關注預警信息，及時關注暴雨、山洪、地質災害等預警提示，合理規劃出行路線和戶外活動。在汛期盡量避免前往山區溝道、河道、低窪地帶等遊玩逗留，應增強避險意識，自覺維護防汛秩序及積極參與防汛志願服務。  

北京氣象部門預計，今年汛期全市平均降水量達510至590毫米，比常年同期偏多大約2成至4成，但少於去年同期。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 政府下周就修訂食物內甜味劑規例徵詢立法會意見　年內展開諮詢
news_content:
政府擬修訂《食物內甜味劑規例》，以更有效保障公眾健康及與國際標準接軌。環境及生態局和食環署食安中心將於下周二先徵詢立法會食物安全及環境衞生事務委員會的意見，並計劃於本年內展開公眾諮詢。

建議的修訂主要包括將多羥醇納入規管範圍、擴大准許甜味劑清單及按食物及甜味劑組合訂定含量上限。食安中心從本港市面抽取食物樣本進行了約900項甜味劑測試，約98%的檢測結果符合建議的最高准許含量。

食環署表示，有信心食物業界可適應擬議修訂，並建議在完成修例程序後設過渡期。食安中心亦會舉行業界技術會議及發出使用指引，以協助業界理解和遵行新規定。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 中英戰略對話　王毅稱要錨定長期穩定全面戰略伙伴關係定位
news_content:
中共中央政治局委員、外長王毅在北京同英國外交大臣顧綺慧舉行中英戰略對話。

王毅表示，當前雙方各領域交往合作逐步進入正軌，雙方要進一步溝通，落實好兩國領導人重要共識，錨定長期穩定的中英全面戰略伙伴關係定位，加強高層交往，為促進世界和平穩定、繁榮發展作出中英兩國的貢獻，為這個動蕩不安的世界注入更多確定性。

王毅強調，中英作為聯合國安理會常任理事國，應該帶頭走正道、秉公道，維護二戰勝利成果，恪守聯合國憲章，堅持真正的多邊主義，共同推動構建更加公正合理的全球治理體系。他又說，希望英方為中資企業提供公平、公正、非歧視的營商環境。

新華社報道，顧綺慧表示，英方願同中方一起，沿著兩國領導人確定的方向，密切高層交往，深化經貿、金融等領域合作。英方在台灣問題上奉行的政策沒有變化，亦不會改變，願意同中方持續通過坦誠對話，建設性妥處分歧。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 與哈薩克簽署多份合備忘錄　香港團代表相信將加深彼此合作發展
news_content:
行政長官李家超率團出訪哈薩克，與當地達成43份備忘錄及合作協議，涵蓋包括經貿、投資、金融服務等多個範圍。

隨團的律政司副司長張國鈞表示，香港的國際仲裁服務排名全球第二、亞太區第一，今次香港國際仲裁中心與阿斯塔納國際仲裁中心簽署兩份備忘錄後，相信會有更廣闊的發展空間。他又說，隨著國際調解院在香港成立總部後，令香港建立全方位的法律配套，將有利國家與中亞市場之間的合作。

貿發局主席馬時亨說，此行其中一個目的是「出海」，現時有3000多間内地公司在哈薩克營運，經過今次特首率團訪問後，相信會有更多内地公司到當地發展及加大投資，亦相信隨著往返香港及哈薩克的直航航線開通後，會有更多生意來到哈薩克。

港交所行政總裁陳翊庭表示，港交所昨日分別與阿斯塔納國際金融中心和阿斯塔納交易所簽署合作備忘錄，透過今次隨團訪問，接觸了很多當地企業，希望未來能見到更多哈薩克企業利用香港的資本市場進行集資。

隨團的内地企業代表、廣州醫藥集團董事長李小軍表示，今次是首次到訪中亞，公司目前正加快進行國際化業務佈局，期望透過今次特首代表團的橋樑作用，與中亞國家的政府、市場、企業、大學建立關係，希望可以在中亞進行產業佈局，共同推出先進的生物醫藥和健康產品，同時助推兩地經濟發展。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 柬埔寨就與泰國重疊海域問題致函聯合國　啟動強制調解程序
news_content:
柬埔寨首相洪瑪奈發表電視講話，指出柬埔寨政府已正式致函泰國政府和聯合國秘書處，啟動《聯合國海洋法公約》框架下的強制調解程序，就柬泰重疊海域問題，闡述柬埔寨政府立場，並重申柬方堅持依據國際法及和平原則，推動解決重疊海域爭議。

泰國總理府發言人上月表示，內閣會議決定廢除與柬埔寨的一份關於兩國重疊海域問題的備忘錄，轉而採用《聯合國海洋法公約》框架下的國際法機制，以更好維護國家利益。

有關備忘錄於2001年簽署，重點在於泰柬兩國就海上邊界談判，包括石油資源的共同利用。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 【重溫】2026年6月2日新聞天地
news_content: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。

title: 李慧琼：官員與議員溝通屬良性互動
news_content:
立法會主席李慧琼表示，近日約見立法會所有事務委員會的正、副主席及部分新任議員，了解工作情況，普遍認為本屆政府官員和議員的溝通是良性互動。

李慧琼要求議員，在發言前要做好功課，按事實、界別，反映市民的意見，亦期望官員尊重不同議員的發言內容。



編輯：劉景輝

title: Coach apologises over alleged slapping incident
news_content:
A basketball coach of a secondary school in Siu Sai Wan has apologised over a suspected case of corporal punishment.

Secretary for Education Christine Choi said officials will follow up on the incident.

A video circulating online purportedly showed the coach, Yung Kam-wah, holding the hand of a student and forcing him to slap himself in front of other youngsters.

Writing on social media, Yung, who is also a former SAR basketball team player, apologised to the student.

He admitted he should not have penalised anyone in this way under any circumstances.

Yung said he would deeply reflect on the matter and promised not to repeat the mistake, noting that the incident caused discomfort and harm to the students.

He also said he would cooperate with all investigations.

In a statement, the incorporated management committee of Hon Wah College said the incident happened during 2023/2024 academic year.

The committee said it has suspended the duties of Yung and launched an investigation.

The police have been notified as well.

The committee added that it has reached out to the affected student and arranged assistance.

The school has issued a letter to all parents, offering assistance and support to students in need.

Speaking to reporters, Choi said the Education Bureau attaches great importance to the incident and contacted the school immediately after the incident came to light.

“We will also strictly follow up on the matter, and request the school to submit a report as soon as possible to give a detailed account of the incident,” she said.

“We will also keep close contact with the school to provide appropriate assistance.”

Choi added that the bureau offers guidelines to schools on teachers’ conduct and the management of coaches who are hired externally.

She made it clear the welfare of students should always be the top priority.


Edited by Edmond Fong

title: 歐元區5月通脹升至3.2%　分析認為強化6月加息理由
news_content:
歐盟統計局公布，歐元區5月消費物價指數按年升3.2%，較4月加快0.2個百分點，遠高於歐洲央行2%的目標，但符合市場預期。

上月通脹主要受到能源及服務價格推動。

5月剔除波動較大的能源、食品和煙酒價格的核心通脹率加快0.3個百分點至2.5%，因為服務價格上升，及工業品通脹向上。

分析指，5月的整體通脹率，尤其服務業通脹率進一步上升，強化歐洲央行下周加息理由，反映核心通脹上行風險或高於預期。



編輯：李意琴

title: 政府稱合安保障所有宏福苑業主權益前提下　促成召開業主大會
news_content:
宏福苑法團管理人「合安管理有限公司」申請押後召開業主大會，土地審裁處裁定無司法管轄權批准延展時限，駁回合安的申請。民政事務總署表示，合安會繼續竭盡所能，在保障所有宏福苑業主權益的前提下，促成召開業主大會，署方會提供適切協助。

署方回覆查詢時重申，合安自獲委任作為宏福苑業主立案法團管理人後，一直依法履行職責，今次合安申請延期召開業主大會，主要因為需要更多時間為召開會議做大量準備工作，今次裁決涉及《建築物管理條例》的詮釋，政府會研究有關判詞。

署方又提到，判詞指出，就合安的申請，業主中既有支持者，亦有反對者。土地審裁處認為雙方各自有實際及正當的關注，各方提出的理由均具相當分量，不能一概抹煞。法庭同時確認，在宏福苑的特別情況下，要發出會議通知書及舉行會議實在遇到一定難處，並讚賞合安及民政事務總署在有關方面所作出的努力。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 回應教練懷疑體罰學生　蔡若蓮稱嚴肅跟進促學校盡快交報告
news_content:
網上流傳片段，漢華中學有學生在學校球場懷疑被一名教體罰。教育局局長蔡若蓮表示，明白各界關注事件，已即時聯絡學校，校方亦已啟動危機處理小組，包括暫停有關教練職務，亦為有需要同學提供輔導及支援，局方會嚴肅跟進有關事件及要求學校盡快提交報告。

蔡若蓮又表示，就外聘教練有指引提供予學校，亦提醒學校及所有從事教育工作的人士，均應該以學生的福祉為最優先考慮。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 特首率香港媒體代表到中亞開拓網絡　簽署七份合作備忘錄
news_content:
上任近一個月的新聞處處長謝振中首次以處長身份隨行政長官李家超率團外訪。他在社交平台說，今次更是第一次有新聞界代表同行，別具意義。

他說，特首率領香港媒體代表到中亞開拓商機，正是回應去年《施政報告》提出的政策方向，協助本地傳媒拓展香港以外的網絡，向世界說好「香港故事」。

謝振中提到，香港媒體代表與哈薩克的媒體和公私營機構簽署七份合作備忘錄，涵蓋國際傳播、媒體推廣，以及影視娛樂內容協作，稍後在烏茲別克亦將有更多成果。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 中方促國際社會緊急行動　恢復黎巴嫩和中東地區和平
news_content:
中國常駐聯合國代表傅聰，在安理會有關黎巴嫩以色列局勢緊急公開會上發言。

他說，黎以停火接近名存實亡，國際社會必須採取緊急行動。中方願同各方共同努力，恢復黎巴嫩和中東地區和平穩定。



編輯：劉景輝

title: 李家超：與哈薩克在政府層面合作取得實質成果
news_content:
行政長官李家超繼續在哈薩克的訪問行程。他表示，取得多項成果，達成43份備忘錄和合作協議，涵蓋經貿投資、金融服務、科技、教育、航空、綠色金融等。他與當地政府同意，全速就簽訂全面性避免雙重課稅協定展開磋商，對促進和保護投資協定展開討論，盡快落實有關協定。

另外，香港與哈薩克阿拉木圖，將在明年首季開通直航航班。



編輯：劉景輝

title: 李家超：與哈薩克在政府層面合作取得實質成果
news_content:
行政長官李家超繼續在哈薩克的訪問行程。他表示，取得多項成果，達成43份備忘錄和合作協議，涵蓋經貿投資、金融服務、科技、教育、航空、綠色金融等。他與當地政府同意，全速就簽訂全面性避免雙重課稅協定展開磋商，對促進和保護投資協定展開討論，盡快落實有關協定。

另外，香港與哈薩克阿拉木圖，將在明年首季開通直航航班。



編輯：劉景輝

title: 教育局指操作偏差致誤發小一派位短訊
news_content:
教育局表示，由於在設定系統發送程序時，出現操作偏差，導致原定於明日起公布的小一統一派位結果，相關短訊錯誤提早在今早發放，教育局已通知家長，毋須理會今早發出有關小一派位的短訊，事件也不影響派位結果。



編輯：劉景輝

title: 美國下調部分鋼鋁銅產品進口關稅
news_content:
美國總統特朗普簽署文件，下調部分鋼鋁銅產品的進口關稅。

根據文件，收割機和部分其他農業機械適用的進口從價關稅從25%下調至15%。調整後的關稅措施將從當地下星期一開始實施，但從2028年1月1日開始將恢復適用現行關稅稅率。

特朗普在首個總統任期曾對進口鋼鋁加徵關稅，去年再度入主白宮後，特朗普調整前總統拜登政府時期的鋼鋁政策，並出台銅關稅政策。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: HKTDC seals three agreements in Kazakhstan
news_content:
The Hong Kong Trade Development Council (HKTDC) on Tuesday signed memorandums of understanding with three organisations in Kazakhstan.

The individual agreements were made with Atameken, the National Chamber of Entrepreneurs of Kazakhstan; Satbayev University, a leading technical university in Almaty; and the Association of Consulting and Trading Companies.

Chief Executive John Lee and Kazakhstan's Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of National Economy Serik Zhumangarin witnessed the exchange of documents at a luncheon.

Zhumangarin said he is confident that the partnership between the two sides will deepen in the future.

“Overall, the visit of the esteemed John Lee and the entire delegation is a practical confirmation of mutual trust, business interests and readiness to move towards the implementation of concrete projects,” he said. 

“I am confident that today's meeting will become an important step towards launching new joint projects, attracting investments and expanding business ties.”

Several business entities among the delegation also signed individual memorandums of understanding with their counterparts in Kazakhstan, covering sectors such as finance, asset management, aviation, media, agriculture and new energy.

A number of the agreements were signed by state-backed investment bank China International Capital Corporation Limited (CICC) as well as their Kazakh partners, including one with the Sovereign Wealth Fund Samruk-Kazyna.

The Hong Kong Airport Authority and Cathay Pacific also secured operational agreements with Almaty International Airport. 

Cathay announced that it plans to operate three direct flights per week connecting Hong Kong to Almaty, starting in the first quarter of next year.

The Chinese Manufacturers' Association of Hong Kong, Federation of Hong Kong Industries and Hong Kong General Chamber of Commerce also secured deals.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 在岸人民幣再創逾3年新高
news_content:
在岸人民幣再創逾3年新高，收報6.7622兌1美元，升28點子。

分析指，市場持續偏向結匯，短期人民幣料易升難跌。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 翁金驊就責罰學生致歉　漢華中學：暫停教練職務並與警方緊密聯繋
news_content:
網上流傳片段，漢華中學有學生在學校球場懷疑被一名教練體罰，涉事教練為前港隊籃球代表翁金驊。他在社交平台向該名學生深表歉意，承認無論學生觸犯任何過失或基於任何情況，他都不應以此方式責罰同學，強調會深刻反省，絕不會重蹈覆轍。漢華中學校董會發表聲明，指事件發生於2023至2024學年，已暫停該教練職務，並與警方緊密聯繫。

翁金驊表示，明白事件為學生帶來不適或傷害，他已停止在學校的教練職務，全面配合任何相關調查，又指事件辜負外界對他的期望。

漢華中學校董會發表聲明表示，對事件深表關注，已即時啟動「危機處理小組」跟進及展開詳細調查，並已聯絡涉事學生，安排專責人員提供適切支援。為保障學生福祉及確保調查公平公正，已暫停涉事教練職務，並與警方緊密聯繫。

校方已發出家長信，學生如有任何情緒需要，可向學校輔導主任、駐校社工或教育心理學家尋求協助。校方將會為學生提供適切的輔導及支援，將會配合調查，並適時向校董會報告。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 證監會要求持牌機構加強網絡安全措施　應對AI模型驅動新興威脅
news_content:
證監會發通函，要求持牌機構加強網絡安全措施，以應對由前沿人工智能（AI）模型驅動的新興威脅。

證監會敦促持牌機構，尤其是網上經紀行和虛擬資產交易平台，實施穩健措施並適時更新，以保護系統，防止客戶機密資料遭到未經授權接達或披露，以及保障客戶資產免被挪用。證監會列出持牌機構的網絡安全框架內，應該檢討及加強的範疇，以確保適時更新並有效運作。

證監會表示，AI新近發展令惡意者更易、更快地識別並利用系統漏洞，協調跨越多個互聯系統的攻擊，以及策動大規模攻擊；同時AI驅動工具日趨普及，降低惡意者進行網絡釣魚、社交工程、深度偽造假冒他人身分及偵察的門檻。

證監會將繼續有關議題與業界、科技服務提供者以及本地和海外監管機構保持溝通，並會一如既往，持續舉辦網絡研討會以提升業界意識等，並針對不斷演變的風險採取適當的監管行動。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 李家超邀請哈薩克企業來港考察　了解北都與金融創科等最新發展
news_content:
正在中亞訪問的行政長官李家超表示，今天中午與哈薩克總理會面，並對哈薩克官方連日來給予香港代表團的高規格接待，表示衷心感謝。

李家超在社交專頁表示，兩人就兩地經濟、基建、文化、教育、旅遊等多領域發展深入交換意見。李家超在會面中提到，香港無論是官方還是商界，高度重視和哈薩克建立更緊密的合作關係。兩地在金融、貿易、投資、產業等方面存在巨大互補性和合作機遇，哈薩克豐富的自然資源和廣闊的市場潛力，與香港國際化的專業服務體系高度契合。他更邀請哈薩克企業來香港考察，特別是走進香港未來經濟新引擎的北部都會區，了解香港金融、創科、法律服務等最新發展。

李家超提到，特區政府推出的「一帶一路獎學金」深受中亞學生歡迎，其中哈薩克學生佔比最高，本學年有超過500名哈薩克學生在香港院校就讀。李家超說，這些年輕學生和今次隨團訪問的香港各界代表，都將成為日後推動兩地加強聯繫、共同發展的重要橋樑，他期待兩地攜手共同開啟友好合作的新篇章。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: Retail sales up by 8.6pc in April amid vehicle surge
news_content:
The growth pace of Hong Kong's retail sales was up by 8.6 percent year on year to HK$31.4 billion in April but slowed compared to a month earlier.

Data released by the Census and Statistics Department also showed that the revised estimate of the value of total retail sales stood at almost HK$34 billion in March, an increase of 12.8 percent year on year.

In terms of volume, retail sales rose by 6.4 percent year on year in April, after seeing an annual growth rate of 9.8 percent in March.

By categories, sales of motor vehicles and parts increased the most in April, up by around 46 percent year on year in value terms, while that of jewellery, watches and clocks as well as valuable gifts rose by nearly 20 percent.

Sales of electrical goods and other consumer durable goods not elsewhere classified were up by nearly 22 percent from a year ago.

On the other hand, sales of fuels declined the most during the period, dropping 11.7 percent year on year, while that of Chinese drugs and herbs were 8.5 percent lower than a year ago.

Commenting on the figures, a government spokesman said that total retail sales increased "solidly" in April, with growth seen in sales of most broad types of retail outlets.

"Looking ahead, the retail sector should continue to benefit from ongoing economic expansion, notable increase in inbound visitors and resilient consumption sentiment," he said.

"The government will stay alert to the downside risk arising from the evolving geopolitical tensions and their possible effects on the local consumption market." 

Taking the first four months of the year together, retail sales rose by 11.3 percent year on year in terms of the value, and advanced by 9 percent in terms of volume.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: HK stocks surge on Tencent and Meituan gains
news_content:
Tech shares rose across Hong Kong and mainland markets on Tuesday, led by gains in Tencent and Meituan while investors cautiously evaluated Middle East peace talks.

The benchmark Hang Seng Index rose 640 points, or 2.5 percent, to 26,038 on turnover of HK$373.78 billion for its biggest daily rise in nearly two months.

The China enterprises index gained 255 points, or 3 percent, to 8,762 while the tech index rose 234 points, or 4.7 percent, to 5,199.

Shares of Tencent Holdings leapt 10.5 percent after the Financial Times reported the company moved closer to launching an AI agent for WeChat's 1.4 billion Chinese users.

Chinese food delivery leader Meituan jumped 9.3 percent. It posted a third consecutive quarterly loss on Monday and met revenue growth estimates, but a year of subsidy-fuelled competition in China's one-hour delivery space showed signs of easing.

For markets up north, the Shanghai Composite Index rose 17 points, or 0.43 percent, to close at 4,075 on turnover of 1.28 trillion yuan. 

The Shenzhen Component Index gained 250 points, or 1.63 percent, to 15,591, on turnover of 1.51 trillion yuan while the ChiNext Index surged 104 points, or 2.66 percent, to 4,055 on turnover of 714 billion yuan.

In Tokyo, the Nikkei ended the day 200 points, or 0.3 percent, down at 66,734. The broader Topix edged down 16 points, or 0.42 percent, to 3,924.24.

In Seoul, the Kospi South Korean shares notched a record closing high in rising 13 points, or 0.15 percent, to 8,801 after a volatile session of trading that saw technology firms leading gains on hopes of AI cooperation with Nvidia ahead of the arrival of its boss Jensen Huang.


"Markets are entering June balancing renewed geopolitical risks from US-Iranian military exchanges against continued enthusiasm for AI-driven growth and technology investment," said Bob Savage, head of markets macro strategy at BNY.

"Meanwhile, China stands out as the only major emerging market attracting inflows across the equity, fixed income and currency markets."

Lebanon announced on Monday a partial ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel.

Earlier, Iranian state media said Tehran was halting indirect negotiations with the United States and might end the ceasefire, citing the war in Lebanon. US President Donald Trump, meanwhile, said talks with Iran were ongoing "at a rapid pace". (Reuters & Xinhua)



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: HKEX signs two cooperation pacts in Kazakhstan
news_content:
Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing (HKEX) announced on Tuesday it has signed two memoranda of understanding in Kazakhstan as part of efforts to deepen market connectivity with Central Asia.

The signing came after the bourse operator joined the government's largest delegation to date to visit Kazakhstan from Sunday, with its agreements among a total of 43 signed so far.

In a statement, HKEX noted that one of the agreements is with Astana International Exchange (AIX) which operates within the Astana International Financial Centre (AIFC).

The AIFC is a special economic zone that was launched in 2018 in the Kazakh capital, Astana, and serves as the country's international financial hub under a common law umbrella.

It's also part of the Belt and Road Initiative's financial infrastructure, which aims to increase financial connectivity in countries and regions such as Central Asia, China, Russia and the Arab states.

Under the agreement, the two exchanges would cooperate on widening cross-border listing opportunities and growing dual listings in equities, as well as cross-border listings of debt securities on their respective exchanges.

The HKEX also signed an agreement with the AIFC Authority, which is the body responsible for the strategic development of the AIFC.

Under this deal, HKEX would pursue cooperation with the authority in areas such as climate transition, decarbonisation, green finance, sustainable aviation projects, as well as trading of commodities and financing of the early-stage mining projects.

HKEX chief executive Bonnie Chan said she is "delighted" to see the two sides reaching agreements, adding that the MoUs would help "unlock new opportunities" for global issuers and investors.

She added that the deals extended the SAR's role as a market "connector" supporting the two-way flow of capital between the city and Central Asia, after the two sides welcomed their first dual-listing firm last year.

"I've already come into contact with many [Kazakh] local enterprises during this trip, and I hope in the coming days, we'll see more enterprises from Kazakhstan raise funds by making use of the capital market in Hong Kong," she said in Astana.

"Meanwhile, many mainland companies actually have already established businesses here in Kazakhstan, many of which listed in Hong Kong. 

"It's inspiring for me to learn more about how are they using the funds raised in Hong Kong to help them expand in Central Asia. And I hope we can do more in this front," she added.

Bakhtiyar Tleubekov, chairman of the management board of AIFC Authority, noted in a statement that the collaboration between the two sides "marks an important step" on enhancing connectivity between Central Asia and Asia-Pacific.

Echoing Tleubekov, Astana International Exchange chief executive Assel Mukazhanova said there's "huge potential" for the two sides to together facilitate cross-border capital flows.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 蔡若蓮就小一派位短訊錯誤發放深表歉意　如涉人為疏忽必嚴肅跟進
Celebrations breathe more fire into dragon boat races
news_content:
A record number of teams will join this month's Hong Kong International Dragon Boat Races as the event is upgraded to mark its 50th anniversary, organisers said on Tuesday. 

The Hong Kong Tourism Board and Hong Kong China Dragon Boat Association said the races between June 27 and 28 will have more than 220 teams and 4,500 competitors from 16 regions and countries, including Indonesia which will make its debut.

As part of the golden jubilee celebrations, there will be an invitational cup featuring six local fishermen teams competing in wooden dragon boats, while the winners of nine main events will also battle it out for the title of "ultimate champions".

The races in Victoria Harbour are part of a 13-day Hong Kong International Dragon Boat Festival that will be held at the Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade between June 19 and July 1.

Other activities will include cultural heritage workshops, such as rice dumpling and fish net making, and a virtual reality dragon boat paddling experience.

“With the event entering the golden jubilee, we have jointly upgraded the event as the International Dragon Boat Festival," tourism board chairman Peter Lam said.

"No only will the duration of the event be extended, the scale of the races is larger than previous years. The entertainment experience will also be enhanced to make the event more appealing.”



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 外交部：冀菲方言行一致　嚴格約束官員言行
news_content:
在北京，外交部在例行記者會回應菲律賓防長特奧多羅在香格里拉對話會上的涉華言論，發言人毛寧表示，菲方領導人多次表態願意同中方妥處分歧、推動雙邊關係緩和，希望菲方言行一致，嚴格約束官員言行，不要任由個別跳樑小丑一再破壞雙方穩定關係的努力。

特奧多羅日前表示，雖然中方最近在菲律賓因戰爭物資短缺而提供化肥和燃料，但中國仍然構成威脅，並沒有展現出長期信任。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 外交部：軍國主義的魔盒一旦打開　沒有任何人可以獨善其身
news_content:
在北京，外交部在例行記者會回應日本首相高市早苗日前表示，在戰後最嚴峻的安保環境下，為了防衛而提升威懾力、防範紛爭於未然，正是修改防衛裝備轉移三原則的本質。發言人毛寧表示，炒作外部威脅，為擴軍備戰找藉口，是日本軍國主義的慣用手法。

毛寧說，日本解禁殺傷性武器出口，強化軍工產業，安保政策加速向進攻性轉變，這系列危險動向同二戰前軍國主義籌備發動戰爭的過程何其相似。軍國主義的魔盒一旦打開，沒有任何人可以獨善其身，終將養虎為患。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 逾百名青少年獲委任為青年國安大使　鄧炳強稱將陸續增加大使人數
news_content:
保安局局長鄧炳強表示，現時有超過100名保安局及轄下部隊的青少年隊員獲委任為青年國安大使，部分獲推薦在國家安全展覽廳擔任導賞員，期間有一定要求和考核，也需要到社區不同地方參與國安活動展覽，推廣國家安全，相信現時大約100名大使只是「起點」，當局會視乎資源不時進行檢討，陸續增加大使人數。

在立法會一個委員會上，新民黨李梓敬表示，香港載荷專家黎家盈早前隨神舟二十三號載人飛船升空，市民對此感雀躍，建議當局利用這契機，安排邀請黎家盈與保安局青少年團體進行視像對話，或在返回香港時與青少年交流分享，又建議增設與航天太空相關的青少年團體，鼓勵他們追夢。

鄧炳強指出，不少團體已安排青少年到內地參觀火箭發射基地和航天超算中心，也有舉行航天科技考察團，培育青少年有關航天的工作。

民建聯陳克勤關注，當局會否為不同紀律部隊爭取額外資源，投放予青年工作，減輕部門開支壓力。鄧炳強回應說，不同部隊情況不一，當局會適時檢討人手編排，如有需要會提供相應資源，避免影響前線工作。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 長實料本港經濟下半年繼續向好　豪宅需求愈來愈大
news_content:
長實執行董事趙國雄表示，樓市如果持續復甦，受豪宅帶動的機會較大，相信本港經濟下半年繼續向好，市場對豪宅需求愈來愈大。

集團推出半山波老道項目第二期16個單位，以招標方式發售。趙國雄表示，考慮過目前市況後決定推售，認為是合適時間，指出豪宅供應稀缺，市況未如理想時不會平賣。而政府將價值逾1億元的住宅物業印花稅稅率上調至6.25%，但買家主要是考慮購得心頭好，市場選擇不多。

趙國雄說，樓市目前回升數個百分點就認為過熱，是言過其實，認為當庫存逐步消化，樓市就會恢復，預計會持續向上調整，目前難以評估升幅，但亦觀察不到有下行機會。他說，本港致力發展為資產管理中心，當局亦推動家族辦公室發展，對本港長遠發展有幫助。

長實表示，去年上半年一手交投8000多宗，今年首5個月已經逾萬宗，預計整個上半年逾1.2萬宗；價值逾1億元的超級豪宅今年首4個月成交逾90宗，成交額190億元，按年都升逾1倍。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 李家超與哈薩克國家投資控股公司董事會主席會面　提及北都機遇
news_content:
正率團在哈薩克訪問的行政長官李家超表示，今早到訪哈薩克國家投資控股公司並與董事會主席會面交流，介紹香港在「一國兩制」下獨特優勢。

他強調香港作為國際金融中心，完全有能力成為哈薩克企業接通內地、東盟，以至全球市場的「超級聯繫人」和「超級增值人」。

李家超在社交平台表示，會上亦特別提及北部都會區的創科發展機遇，土地、財政和稅務等方面的優惠政策，歡迎對方來港探索合作潛力。雙方亦探討未來合作方向，包括項目融資，在綠色金融和金融科技等前沿領域的協作，攜手實踐「一帶一路」倡議的永續發展願景。

李家超邀請對方公司繼續參與香港的「一帶一路高峰論壇」和「亞洲金融論壇」。他相信今次對話是雙方互利共贏的新起點，香港定能發揮「雙向跳板」的角色，協助哈薩克企業走向亞洲，同時引領全球資金落戶中亞。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: Police arrest couple in 'unregistered birth' saga
news_content:
A man and a woman have been arrested on suspicion of child neglect over a baby said to have been left without a birth certificate following a home birth. 

The couple's story sparked debate online after they spoke about attempts to be reunited with another child that was placed in foster care in Sweden a number of years ago.

The pair have refused to provide a DNA sample in order to obtain a birth certificate for a baby boy in their care after failing to register a birth within the timeframe set out in law. 

Security Secretary Chris Tang said police found the couple and the child in Cheung Sha Wan on Tuesday. 

The boy was to be taken to hospital for a health check, Tang said.

"The mother has not yet provided any records of prenatal care or medical examinations, and refused to provide a DNA sample. She has not even provided any photos of herself while pregnant," the minister told reporters. 

"The individuals claiming to be the parents have never taken him to hospital for a physical examination." 

Tang added that he hopes the couple will quickly provide proof of their relationship to the boy. 



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 本港4月零售業總銷貨價值314億元　按年上升8.6%
港股高收640點　恒指重上26000點　騰訊大成交急升逾一成
news_content:
港股連升3個交易日，恒指重上26000點以上收市，成交額增至近3738億元。

恒指在多隻大型科技及平台股帶動下，尾市升幅擴大至逾600點，收報26038點，創超過半個月收市新高，升640點，幅度2.5%。

科技指數收報5199點，升逾4.7%。

ATMXJ全線上升，騰訊表現最好，升逾10%，成交額大增至近478億元，據報將為微信用戶推出AI助手。美團業績後升9%以上，是兩隻表現最好的恒指及科技成份股。

汽車股普遍造好，理想、小鵬、比亞迪股份及蔚來升近6%至8%以上。聯想集團延續升勢，再升逾半成，再創新高。

另外，個別有色金屬股、內銀股亦上升，但部分本地地產股、公用股及內需股逆市下跌。



編輯：方嘉莉

title: 許正宇：將公布推動企業財資中心在港發展行動方案
news_content:
波士頓諮詢公司（BCG）報告顯示，香港已超越瑞士，成為全球最大跨境財富管理中心。

財經事務及庫務局局長許正宇表示，成績來之不易，不但印證香港作為國際金融中心的強大韌性，更反映全球投資者以實際行動投下信心一票。

許正宇在網誌提到，3年多前政府舉辦首屆「裕澤香江」高峰論壇，並發表《有關香港發展家族辦公室業務的政策宣言》，確立推動相關產業發展的清晰方向，推出8項前瞻措施，短短3年多，政策由藍圖落實為成果，推動香港登上全球首位，形容並非偶然，而是政府與業界協同發力、精準施策的必然結果。

他提到，當局本月就優化基金、單一家族辦公室和附帶權益優惠稅制向立法會提交立法建議，亦即將公布有關推動企業財資中心在香港發展的行動方案，積極回應業界實際需求。

許正宇提到，未來20至30年間，全球將有高達83萬億美元私人財富進行跨代傳承，是現代史上最大規模財富轉移，亞洲情況尤為迫切，當中涉及所有權結構、治理模式、領導交接及家族使命等多重課題，認為香港有能力也有條件，成為全球家族在世紀財富交接浪潮中首選平台與可靠夥伴。

他認為，財富猶如一塊強大的「磁石」，當制度、政策與基建形成吸引力，便能持續吸納全球資本，並衍生自我強化的發展動能。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 瑞典回港父母家中產子　鄧炳強：父母涉疏忽照顧被捕嬰兒已送院
衞防中心稱新冠已成本港風土病　籲有需要人士及早預約接種疫苗
news_content:
衞生防護中心表示，政府2019冠狀病毒病疫苗接種計劃下提供的疫苗，有效期即將屆滿，提供予兒童和成人的LP.8.1疫苗，有效期將分別於今年7月中及9月初屆滿。新一批疫苗會於今年第四季陸續運抵本港。在過渡期間，合資格人士將短暫無法透過接種計劃免費接種新冠疫苗，有需要人士請及早預約，並在有關日期前完成接種。

6個月大至11歲兒童疫苗接種服務提供至今年7月10日；12歲或以上人士疫苗接種服務提供至今年9月5日。

中心提醒市民，新冠病毒已成為本港的風土病，總監徐樂堅說，雖然新冠病毒的整體活躍程度目前處於一個低水平，但新冠病毒一般每約6至9個月會經歷一次活躍周期，與主流變異病毒株變化及社區群體免疫力下降有關。本港距離上一次新冠活躍周期的完結已接近一年，不排除新冠病毒的整體活躍程度會上升。鑑於政府的新冠疫苗將暫停供應一段短時間，呼籲有需要的合資格人士盡快預約。政府疫苗接種服務今年第四季有序恢復，詳情將另行公布。



編輯：任順熙

title: 本港5月送交註冊住宅買賣合約總值按月升3%　按年升71%
news_content:
土地註冊處公布，5月送交註冊的住宅樓宇買賣合約共7138份，按月下跌3.1%，按年上升39.8%；合約總值656億元，按月上升3%，按年上升71.5%。

5月送交註冊所有種類樓宇買賣合約共8537份，按月下跌1.8%，按年上升32.5%；合約總值728億元，按月下跌0.1%，按年則上升46.1%。



編輯：李意琴

title: 國際龍舟節活動本月19日至下月1日舉行　逾220支隊伍參賽
news_content:
香港國際龍舟節在本月19日至7月1日舉行，首次延長至13天，期間將舉辦香港國際龍舟邀請賽及在尖沙咀海濱舉辦一系列活動。

龍舟賽事將於本月27至28日舉行，有來自16個國家及地區的隊伍參與，包括內地、加拿大、美國、英國等，超過220支隊伍、4500多名參賽者，將進行21項賽事。另外，今次首設非遺工作坊，讓參加者體驗編織漁網、吹糖等，亦可透過虛擬實境（VR）體驗龍舟競渡。

旅發局與旅遊平台合作，推出總值超過港幣2千萬元優惠，涵蓋19個本地景點及3個交通營運商。旅發局亦與支付平台合作，旅客在指定日期於全港近百間參與商場，掃描指定二維碼參與活動，有機會獲得最高港幣或人民幣500元的消費獎賞。

旅發局主席林建岳表示，暑假是旅客出行的黃金檔期，旅發局聯同商界推出一系列總共數十萬份包含景點、餐飲、交通及購物的優惠，希望吸引更多過夜旅客訪港，帶動整體消費。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 日本今年累計報告逾500宗麻疹病例　是去年同期近4倍
news_content:
日本健康危機管理研究機構表示，日本全國醫療機構在上月18至24日共報告11宗麻疹病例；今年以來累計報告511宗，是去年同期的近4倍，其中東京都佔近一半，有250多宗。過去10年間，日本報告麻疹病例最多的年份為2019年，有超過700宗。

機構表示，世界衛生組織2015年認定日本已消滅麻疹，但全球範圍麻疹病例報告數目自2023年持續增加，病毒為海外來源的風險不斷升高，接種兩劑疫苗是預防麻疹及發展成重症的最有效方法。



編輯：鄭皓璟

title: 議員關注天星小輪非票務業務狀況　陳美寶稱船公司擴廣告現已改善
news_content:
審計署報告指出，本港多條渡輪航線乘客量下跌，在立法會政府帳目委員會公開聆訊上，會計界吳錦華提問說，天星小輪有近3000萬元的物業租金收入，比重佔總收入正在減少，關注當局有無要求營辦商做好非票務業務，減輕申請加價壓力。運輸及物流局局長陳美寶說，營辦商的票務收入已有改善，佔比六成，非票務收入佔四成，相比專營巴士，天星小輪的非票務收入比較好，相信與渡輪可以利用碼頭空間拓展廣告等租務有關。

陳美寶提到，渡輪公司可以申請改變碼頭範圍的規劃，當局亦會拉動其他部門推動創新的水上交通，讓營運商有更多發揮。

另外，審計署報告提到渡輪船隻老化，導致機件故障頻繁，營運成本增加。陳美寶表示，會督促天星小輪逐步按計劃為8艘船更換引擎，她已指示運輸署與營辦商聯繫，定期匯報更換引擎進度及服務表現。

運輸署署長謝詠誼說，8艘船服役60年以上，海事處會對船的結構、機械裝置及救生設施進行年檢，亦會隨機登船抽樣檢查。

謝詠誼說，天星小輪2023年沒有呈報事故，不過2024及25年，每年均有10宗以下的事故，調查顯示並非嚴重事故，包括有煙囪因為積聚燃燒物，以致有火舌，署方已責成營辦商安裝閉路電視加強監察，同時加密機件清潔至每6至8星期一次，在內地五一及十一黃金周等假日額外增加班次時，要有專門的機件清潔，防止火舌事故。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 國泰計劃明年首季開辦往來哈薩克阿拉木圖航班　每周三班
news_content:
正率領代表團出訪中亞的行政長官李家超表示，在哈薩克的訪問行程取得多項成果，包括明年首季，香港的航空公司會開通飛往哈薩克阿拉木圖機場的直航航班。國泰航空宣布，計劃明年第一季開辦往來阿拉木圖的直航航班，國泰計劃以空中巴士A330-300寬體客機營運每周三班航班，將會是唯一連接香港與哈薩克的直航服務。

國泰說，公司顧客及商務總裁劉凱詩隨同特首率領的代表團訪問中亞，期間到訪哈薩克，支持香港拓展中亞區內新興市場的商機。

劉凱詩今日與阿拉木圖國際機場主席以及阿拉木圖旅遊局副局長一同出席儀式，劉凱詩表示，中亞是「一帶一路」具重要策略意義的地區，有龐大的商業機遇。作為香港的樞紐航空公司，國泰與香港特區政府目標一致，致力加強與此新興市場的連繫。

劉凱詩又說，公司去年開通了往返內地西北部城市烏魯木齊的直航航班。該城市鄰近中亞，不僅拓展了公司在中國內地的航點網絡，亦有助進一步延伸至其他「一帶一路」沿線的重要目的地。公司很高興宣布計劃開辦往返香港與阿拉木圖的直航航班。這將是國泰首個中亞航點，推動香港與這個充滿活力的地區之人流、物流及資金流，開拓更多新機遇。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: Direct flights from HK to Kazakhstan set for next year
news_content:
Chief Executive John Lee on Tuesday said the city’s push to deepen connectivity with Central Asia is already bearing fruit, as he announced progress on direct flights to Kazakhstan alongside moves to make visa arrangements more convenient for travellers. 

Speaking to reporters in Astana during his first official visit to Central Asia, Lee said a Hong Kong-based airline will begin direct flights to Kazakhstan's biggest city Almaty in the first quarter of next year, significantly cutting travel time between the two places.

He added that the new route will also provide access to other Central Asian, Eastern European and Caucasus regional destinations. 

In a statement, the SAR's flagship carrier Cathay Pacific announced plans to launch direct flights to Almaty in the first quarter of 2027.

"The airline plans to operate three flights per week using an Airbus A330-300 widebody aircraft, which will be the only direct service linking Hong Kong and Kazakhstan," the airline said.

Alongside the aviation breakthrough, Lee confirmed that the SAR is working to substantially extend visa-free access for Hongkongers in Central Asia.

The SAR already has visa-free arrangements with Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan, allowing stays of between 10 and 30 days. 

But Lee said his target is to extend the visa-free period to 30 days for all three nations.

"We and the Kazakh government both agree that this is definitely one of our goals. We have already exchanged some further information with the two governments, and everyone is working hard to work toward this target," he said. 

"We hope that by this year, we can reach the best arrangement." 

He added that Uzbekistan has also signalled its agreement to the proposal following communications before the delegation's departure, Lee added. 

Once agreements with these countries are finalised, the SAR government will seek to facilitate easier entry for the remaining two Central Asian countries.

On Wednesday, Lee is scheduled to visit Astana's Nazarbayev University, where President Xi Jinping first proposed the concept of the Belt and Road Initiative in 2013. 

The chief executive said Hong Kong and Kazakhstan can enhance collaboration on education.

"The Education University of Hong Kong and the Hong Kong Polytechnic University, they will be developing a working relationship with the Nazarbayev University, to further expand the collaboration between the higher education institutions of the two places," he said.

Lee will conclude his stay in Kazakhstan on Wednesday before travelling to Uzbekistan, describing the Astana leg alone as a significant breakthrough – with 43 memoranda of understanding in areas such as economic and trade cooperation, investment, and green finance expected to be signed in the country.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 孫玉菡稱本港採用尖端科技保障工業安全　料重塑工盤安全格局
news_content:
勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡表示，香港正採用尖端科技以確保工業安全，相信有關科技將會重塑建築工地的安全格局。他強調，政府將堅定地推廣人工智能驅動的解決方案和「安全智慧工地」系統。

孫玉菡出席職安健創科博覽開幕禮致辭時表示， 將強制要求在涉及塔式起重機和移動式機械的建築工程中，使用「安全智慧工地」系統。他說，系統配備人工智能感測器，能夠消除盲區，並即時偵測潛在的人機衝突，透過觸發即時警報，有助工人與作業機械之間，維持安全屏障。

他認為透過將人工智慧驅動的系統，加入建築工地的資料當中，將可以為「安全智慧工地」創下新基準，並可以證明實現「零傷亡願景」是切實可行。 

孫玉菡說，勞工處是率先在檢查和執法工作中採用創新技術的機構之一，處方於去年10月開始使用小型無人機進行現場巡查。未來幾個月，亦將會引進小型探測車，協助巡查高風險排水工程及相關事故調查。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 系統錯發小一派位結果通知　教育局稱不涉網絡攻擊
news_content:
小一統一派位原定明日公布結果，教育局指在設定系統發送程序時出現操作偏差，導致短訊被錯誤提早發放，對引起家長不便深表歉意。教育局在事件發生後，已立即對全部學生的派位資料進行全面而嚴謹的核查，局方向家長作出澄清，今早短訊不影響派位結果。

教育局已即時加設熱線，電話號碼分別為 2832 7700、2832 7740 回覆家長查詢。教育局今早已透過短訊通知家長，毋須理會早前發出有關小一派位的短訊，教育局亦呼籲家長毋須急於聯絡學校。全港所有正式、具備完整正確註冊詳情的派位結果，將會按照原定計劃於明日早上7時30分起正式公布。

發言人強調，教育局的資訊系統一直運作穩健，經技術團隊即時全面檢查後，確認系統絕對沒有受到任何網絡攻擊或黑客入侵，核心數據庫完整無缺，今次事件與資訊保安及網絡安全完全無關，家長及學童的個人資料均受到高度加密保護。

教育局高度重視事件，已即時成立危機處理小組跟進，同時局方會就系統、流程、人手配合等進行全面檢視，若發現涉及人員疏忽或程序出錯，局方定必嚴肅跟進。教育局將會進一步優化系統及發放機制的監管流程，確保同類事件不會再次發生。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 李家超：本港航空公司將設直航往哈薩克　冀中亞3國免簽期延長
news_content:
正率領代表團出訪中亞的行政長官李家超表示，在哈薩克的訪問行程取得多項成果，包括明年首季，香港的航空公司會開通飛往哈薩克阿拉木圖機場的直航航班，他相信可多於每周一班，實際是每周兩班或三班，交由航空公司處理。

李家超說，今次是經過政府與政府之間談及航權擴展達到的成果，香港航班除了可以直航飛往阿拉木圖機場，亦可以利用阿拉木圖機場進入中亞其他地區。他相信，可以令到兩地交往及經貿合作更有效。

李家超又說，香港與中亞3個國家，包括哈薩克、烏茲別克及吉爾吉斯，現時已有免簽協定，免簽日數為10日至30日。他的目標是希望將這3個國家的免簽，推展至免簽30日。當完成與這3個國家的免簽延長之後，亦會針對中亞其他2個國家推動兩地人民更方便的往來。

他說，中亞經濟發展迅速，哈薩克是中亞5國中最大的國家，經濟總量亦大，而且哈薩克資源礦產豐富，地理位置特別重要，因此代表團出訪中亞，第一個國家選擇前往哈薩克是理所當然。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 韓正：中英要攜手承擔大國責任　鞏固雙邊關係良好勢頭
news_content:
國家副主席韓正在北京會見英國外交大臣顧綺慧。

韓正表示，今年1月，國家主席習近平同英國首相施紀賢一致同意發展中英長期穩定的全面戰略伙伴關係，開啟兩國關係新篇章。中英關係改善發展符合兩國人民利益。雙方要攜手承擔大國責任，加強戰略溝通，鞏固雙邊關係良好勢頭，不斷挖掘新機遇，孕育新動能，促進人文交流和民心相通。共同踐行真正的多邊主義，攜手推進全球治理體系改革，為世界注入更多穩定性和確定性。

新華社報道，顧綺慧表示，英中在經貿投資、人工智能、綠色發展、應對氣變等領域擁有廣泛共同利益和合作潛力。英方願同中方推進落實兩國領導人達成的重要共識，開展建設性對話和合作，共同應對挑戰。



編輯：方潤南

title: 恒地擬下半年推售大埔迎林　對城規會否決香檳大廈重建提覆核
news_content:
恒地旗下大埔「迎林」去年7月成為中大首個學生校外住宿項目，但推行不足一年結束計劃。恒地執行董事黃浩明在股東大會後表示，集團與中大的租約已經完結，學生需求亦有改變，集團收回項目出售，預料下半年推出。

另外，恒地2024年逾17億元統一尖沙咀香檳大廈B座業權，擬重建成酒店，據報去年及上月先後遭到城規會否決申請。黃浩明說，集團會申請覆核，並留意城規會會否改變決定。

至於相鄰的香檳大廈A座落成近70年，被問到會否待物業樓齡達70年，強拍門檻降至65%時，較易收集業權。黃浩明回應指，目前未必有足夠誘因推行，因為收購價錢高，又期望政府提供更多誘因推動市區重建項目完成。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 薔薇逼近日本九州地區　沖繩縣16人受傷
news_content:
強烈熱帶風暴薔薇逼近日本九州地區南部。日本傳媒說，已經造成沖繩縣16人受傷。

報道說，受薔薇影響，昨日往返沖繩和奄美地區的航班接連取消。據沖繩縣統計，截至今早，全縣共有16人因被強風吹倒等情況受傷。另外發生15宗屋頂受損、窗戶破裂等報告，32宗塌樹事件。

日本多間航空公司取消往返九州等地的約330個航班。新幹線列車運行也將受到影響，其中東海道新幹線明日從首班車開始可能出現運行中斷。

日本氣象廳預計薔薇會帶來大雨，呼籲相關地區民眾嚴防山泥傾瀉、低窪地區水浸、河流水位上漲等災害。



編輯：方潤南

title: 恒地料今年一手成交或達2萬宗　樓價升5-10%
news_content:
恒地主席李家誠表示，本港首5個月一手成交已突破1萬宗，預料今年全年或達到2萬宗，形容今年賣樓數字比去年好很多。他說，樓價持續上升，預料今年樓價或升5%至10%。

對於有市場人士認為樓市開始偏熱，甚至出現盲目入市現象，被問到目前樓價升勢有否過急，恒地執行董事黃浩明認為，只是數年前樓市下跌，隨著經濟好轉而反映在樓價回升上，集團不認為有過熱情況，又指旗下樓盤有很多都是用家入市。集團又說，數個月前已加快推盤，有數個樓盤一推售就沽清。

李家誠表示，中環The Henderson出租率達95%，仍在興建的中環新海濱Central Yards出租率已逾7成，期望未來數月有更好消息。至於旗下民生商場的出租率達9成以上，又指五一假期旅客消費按年多一成多，因此頗有信心。

另外，李家誠提到，環球局勢不太穩定，派息要兼顧公司利益、有穩定財務狀況，考慮到今年賣樓成績，若市況持續向好，希望能夠有更好的派息。



編輯：張詩民

title: Yacht tourism boom on horizon as sailing curbs eased
news_content:
A new policy aimed at allowing yachts from Hong Kong and Macao to enter or exit nine mainland cities in the Greater Bay Area will be a massive catalyst for growth in yacht tourism, said David Norton, vice commodore of Hong Kong Royal Yacht Club, on Tuesday. 

His remark came after the SAR on Saturday welcomed the State Council's approval of exemption from the requirement of a guarantee and implementation of temporary ship nationality registration, enabling yachts from both SARs to access the nine mainland cities.

Speaking on RTHK's Backchat programme, Norton said there used to be great financial and administrative hurdles in the past in trying to get boats across the border in the mainland or Hong Kong for yacht races and sailing events.

"It's very difficult for them to bring their boats into China and for our members to get their boats to attend events in the Chinese mainland, so this [new policy] is a massive boost, and the opportunities for cruising around the beautiful Guangdong coast is also a very interesting prospect," he said.

It will also bring greater convenience and more opportunities for yachters to explore the region, Norton added. 

He also said the industry was looking forward to more details of the scheme being made available and the city becoming a focal point for people who wish to enter Chinese mainland waters.

Speaking on the same programme, Dennis Kwok from the Hong Kong Institute of Vocational Education said the policy will have spillover effects for other industries as well.

"Not only will the owners travel, they might have their guests, their business partners, and also the maintenance crew, everything that will provide a lot of economic benefits to the tourism industry in Hong Kong," said the head of the department of hospitality at the institute's campuses in Chai Wan and Haking Wong.

Although yachts travelling to Hong Kong might not be great in number, Kwok said, they have a major impact on tourism branding and make the city more unique.

He also said a recent proposal for an operational merger for China Ferry Terminal and the Hong Kong-Macau Ferry Terminal was timely as passenger throughput at these two checkpoints had dropped by 6.5 percent last year.

He suggested that one of the ferry terminals be used as additional location to serve yacht tourists.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 李家超：哈薩克考察取得多項成果　更了解當地金融創科等最新發展
港交所於哈薩克簽署合作備忘錄提升香港與中亞資本市場互聯互通
news_content:
香港交易所宣布，分別與負責哈薩克阿斯塔納國際金融中心（AIFC）策略發展的AIFC管理局，以及阿斯塔納國際交易所（AIX）簽署合作備忘錄，以加強協作並提升香港與中亞之間資本市場互聯互通。

根據與AIFC管理局簽署的合作備忘錄，港交所將推進氣候轉型、減碳及綠色金融等領域合作，包括可持續航空項目開發、融資及落實。雙方亦將於大宗商品市場交易及生態圈發展等方面合作，並支持早期採礦項目的融資活動。

與AIX的合作備忘錄下，兩家交易所將合作拓展跨境上市機遇，推動股票雙重上市，包括主要上市及第二上市，以及債務證券在雙方交易所跨境上市。雙方亦將建立定期溝通機制，了解市場發展趨勢，評估進一步業務合作機會。

港交所行政總裁陳翊庭表示，很高興與AIFC管理局及AIX簽署合作協議，與中亞區內其中一個最具活力的金融中心加強聯繫，進一步推動與更多一帶一路市場互聯互通，並指出今次多方合作將有助全球發行人及投資者開拓新機遇，進一步鞏固港交所作為市場互聯互通橋樑的角色，同時支持香港與中亞資本雙向流動。

AIX行政總裁Assel Mukazhanova表示，隨着AIX持續發展成區內資本市場平台，與港交所建立合作關係有助與國際市場融合，有助鞏固兩地之間經濟與投資的聯繫。

AIFC於2018年成立，是哈薩克的國際金融樞紐；AIX在AIFC的監管框架下運作，國際股東包括證券交易所及投資銀行。



編輯：張詩民

title: 李慧琼形容今屆議會團結屬行動型　北京研修考察冀獲領導人接見
news_content:
立法會主席李慧琼與傳媒茶敍，提到今屆立法會會期開始至今約5個月，形容今屆是團結、行動型議會，將繼續守正創新，對接「十五五」規劃、審議法例撥款，深入調研等，成為政府與市民之間雙向溝通橋樑。

對於近日有政府部門以不點名形式反駁議員的說法，李慧琼表示，議員有不同意見很正常，相信每名議員發言均從香港整體利益出發，行政立法關係是一個進行式，需要不斷探索。她提到有議員讚賞官員願意接納意見、亦有議員指部分官員的言論令人感到有些難受，期望各方互相尊重，為國家、香港整體利益向前。

她表示，要求議員在發言前做好功課，包括提供數據支持、按事實及市民意見反映，亦希望官員尊重不同議員的發言內容。

另外，立法會全體議員將於7月19日至25日前往北京參加國家事務研修考察，李慧琼表示，行程包括拜訪中央港澳辦等的中央部委，期望獲領導人接見，但具體安排仍有待確定。

至於有個別議員的知名度不足，李慧琼回應指，提升知名度需要時間，以往立法會較混亂，現時回復理性討論，市民關注度可能會下降，期望外界關注整體議會的運作。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 物業顧問：今年以來住宅或酒店收購以改裝學生宿舍約10宗
news_content:
油麻地彌敦道一間酒店結業，正在放售。根據市場消息，酒店全數162個房間已由學生宿舍營運商承租，月租150萬元。

高力香港研究部及零售顧問主管李婉茵表示，投資市場對學生宿舍興趣增加，收購全幢住宅及酒店等改裝成學生宿舍，單計今年就有約10宗成交，連同去年下半年則有20多宗，大致相當於2021至24年間總和。

她表示，現時約有10萬個大學宿位短缺，計及非本地生增長及潛在供應，至2028年供應缺口仍會維持相若水平。

李婉茵表示，學生宿舍主要在九龍區，並集中在鐵路沿線。如果物業本身是酒店，每房間售價可達400萬元；住宅每平方呎售價約6、7千元，視乎地點及配套等。她表示，相比酒店，學生宿舍營運成本較低，估計投資回報約6%。

title: 孫東強調政府支持創科發展　大學既成合作夥伴亦為本地創科基石
news_content:
創新科技及工業局局長孫東表示，支持創新科技發展一直是特區政府的重點工作，大學不僅是主要合作夥伴，更是本地創科生態系統的基石。

孫東出席科大舉行的本港創科創業活動「獨角獸日」致辭時說，香港正步入創科發展的黃金時代，政府正着力建立推動香港高質量發展的新引擎，聚焦重點領域的科研創新，並引領產業應用發展，他相信香港將成為舉足輕重的國際創科中心，為國家高質量發展作出重要貢獻。

校長葉玉如表示，科大致力協助師生實現創業夢想，並推動科研成果轉化為實用方案，大學持續拓展版圖，積極布局多個策略性科研領域，其中正在籌建的科大醫學院將生命科學與前治科技相結合，致力於培育新一代跨學科的醫學人才，科大亦深度參與國家嫦娥八號探月工程及天宮太空站科研項目，並推展首個在產學研1+計劃框架下具商品化潛力的航天科技項目，讓科研成果造福社會、惠及全球。

科大表示，今年「獨角獸日」超過一千名師生及校友、國際與本地政界代表、業界、投資者及科研人員等參與。其中「國際展區」吸引多個國家和地區的創科企業及機構參與，交流發展經驗、洽談合作，促進香港與「一帶一路」沿線國家及地區在技術應用及產業發展方面的對接。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: ID-limbo baby concern rises over 'Save Lily' couple
news_content:
Secretary for Labour and Welfare Chris Sun said the government is highly concerned about the controversial case involving a couple who refused DNA testing required for their baby's birth certificate following a home birth in Hong Kong.

Speaking after an event on Tuesday, Sun said he hoped a health check and assessment of the baby boy, as well as a meeting with the parents, could be arranged as soon as possible.

He said relevant departments have been following up on the case. 

"From last Thursday, we have been using different methods to get in touch with the parents and family involved," Sun said. 

"Our social workers had waited outside their home at various times of the day. They waited until late on one occasion. 

"We had also left different contact methods for the parents to reach us. 

"It wasn't until yesterday that our social workers were finally able to get in touch with the parents through email." 

The incident sparked concern over the internet after the couple opened a social media page called "Save Lily" in the hope of taking back their second daughter – who was born at home in Finland in 2021 and did not have a birth certificate – after she was put under a formal care order when the family was in Sweden in 2023.

The couple then returned to Hong Kong and gave birth to their third son, Danny, at home. 

Speaking on a radio programme on Tuesday, the father, Tsang, said he and his partner have submitted a statement of self-delivery of birth at home. 

But the couple have not registered Danny's birth within 42 days of delivery  – as required under the law – and refused DNA testing to verify their biological relationship with the infant, citing religious reasons. 

Tsang said he and his partner are unwilling to undergo such testing, saying that DNA information is highly sensitive, and hope to know the reasons for the required procedures. 

Sun said the Immigration Department would follow up on the issue regarding Danny's birth certificate and that it had also reached out to the Chinese embassy in Sweden through the Commissioner's Office of China's Foreign Ministry in Hong Kong to follow up on Lily's case. 

He also said the administration has a comprehensive mechanism for handling matters when it comes to child welfare and will take steps to address the situation as quickly as possible while taking into account all relevant factors. 

Sun added that appropriate support would be forthcoming should the family express any need for it.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 李家超將在哈薩克出席午宴　並見證香港與哈薩克企簽署合作備忘錄
news_content:
行政長官李家超繼續在哈薩克的訪問行程，預計將出席特區政府和貿發局在當地舉行的商務午宴，並見證香港與哈薩克雙方企業，簽署多份合作備忘錄。

李家超昨日與哈薩克總統托卡耶夫會面時表示，哈薩克是香港在中亞最大的貿易夥伴，兩地經貿往來緊密，合作前景廣闊。

title: 特朗普料與伊朗在未來一周達成協議　伊朗稱暫停與美國對話
news_content:
美國總統特朗普表示，認為在未來一星期內將與伊朗達成協議，以延長停火期限並重新開放霍爾木茲海峽。

特朗普又說，美方暫時沒有收到伊方暫停談判的消息，與伊朗的談判正在快速推進。

伊朗較早前指，由於以色列持續在黎巴嫩展開軍事行動，談判團隊暫停通過中間人與美國進行的對話和文本交換，並計劃徹底封鎖霍爾木茲海峽。

title: Officials apologise over school places SMS error
news_content:
The Education Bureau apologised on Tuesday for mistakenly sending text messages to parents who applied for a school place for their children through this year's primary one central allocation.

The bureau said the mistake was down to a system error, meaning results of the allocation were sent a day earlier than scheduled.

It called on parents to disregard the messages, adding that it has promptly fixed the problem.

A total of 16,345 children took part in this year's primary one central allocation. Their parents will be informed of the results on June 3 and 4.

According to the bureau, more than 14,000 children were given one of their top three choices of school, with an overall satisfaction rate of 93.6 percent.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 陳美寶稱接納審計署建議　將多管齊下助渡輪開源節流
news_content:
審計報告顯示，本港多條渡輪航線的乘客量下跌，票務收入不足以應付開支，同時有航線出現脫班情況，促請運輸署加強規管，並與營辦商探討開源節流措施。在立法會政府帳目委員會公開聆訊上，運輸及物流局局長陳美寶表示，接納審計署建議，運輸署會全面跟進，強調重視渡輪營運的可持續性，面對不容易的經營環境，會多管齊下協助節流開源，亦會以嚴謹審慎態度考慮營辦商的加價申請。

民建聯議員鄭泳舜提問時說，天星小輪2024年全年載客量1600多萬人次，不及疫情前的1900多萬人次，關注如何吸引更多人乘搭。陳美寶表示，近年港鐵路線擴展，尤其東鐵綫開通過海段後更為方便，渡輪乘客量下跌，未必能夠追至疫情前的水平，但她認為亦有契機，許多內地遊客來港會在社交平台小紅書推介乘搭渡輪欣賞維港景色。

她說天星小輪34%乘客是本港居民，其餘是遊客，繁忙時段班次算密，約6至12分鐘一班，個別時候有脫班，但整體可靠度維持在超過9成，甚至接近百分百的高水平。陳美寶指出，已與營辦商探討是否容許乘客帶同寵物或單車搭船，助力開拓吸引更多本港居民乘搭，又認為營辦商可以善用電子方式，令遊客更易掌握班次資訊。

為增加渡輪的非票務收入，運輸署署長謝詠誼提到，署方建議營辦商提供自提櫃服務，用盡所有舖面，營運商本月起要每月提交招租詳細情況，交代店舖用途及租水金平，從而深入分析，探討如何結合旅遊，做好寵物經濟等。

另外，身兼旅發局成員的飲食界議員梁進，關注當局如何簡化渡輪碼頭範圍的分租申請流程，謝詠誼回應說，署方已成立專責小組，會聯同不同政府部門審視每個項目，期望本月召開第一次會議，從而做到提速提效。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 港股半日升370點　科技股上揚
news_content:
港股今早曾升逾400點，恒生指數一度高見25812點，中午收市報25768點，升370點，升幅逾1%。主板半日成交近2001億元。

科技股帶動大市上揚，科技指數半日升逾3%，半日報5137點。美團及騰訊升近8%；京東集團及阿里巴巴分別升4%及半成。

聯想集團繼續創新高，半日收市報26.36元，升逾4%。

汽車股亦普遍造好。

地產股逆市向下，新地跌逾3%。重磅金融股個別發展。



編輯：勞家樂

title: 滬指半日接近平收　創業板指數升逾2%
news_content:
內地股市半日個別發展，光通信、人工智能個人電腦等股份上升；影視、體育和遊戲股份下跌。

上證綜合指數反覆偏軟，上午收市報4056點，跌1點。

深證成份指數報15487點，升147點，升幅0.96%。

創業板指數報4035點，升84點，升幅2.15%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 教育局系統問題錯向家長提早發出小一派位結果訊息　就此致歉
news_content:
教育局表示，今日因系統設定問題，向家長發出小一派位結果短訊。局方特此呼籲家長毋須理會今早收到的短訊。

局方指，全港正式的派位結果，將依原定計劃於明日、6月3日，透過短訊正式發送。

局方已即時修復系統，對引起家長不便深表歉意。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 俄羅斯對烏克蘭多處發動空襲造成多人死傷
news_content:
俄羅斯對烏克蘭多處發動空襲，包括首都基輔、第聶伯羅和哈爾科夫，造成多人死亡，數十人受傷。

有報道說，空襲導致首都基輔至少3人死亡，20多人受傷；在東部的第聶伯羅有4人喪生。

基輔市長克利奇科說，一座24層高的樓宇被導彈擊中，有民眾被困在瓦礫。而另一座9層高建築物懷疑被碎片波及著火。在奧博隆區，多部汽車被導彈碎片擊中焚燒。

俄軍空襲警報響起後，數千名基輔市民進入地鐵站與避難所躲避。



編輯：方潤南

title: Zhipu joins Shanghai listing race as AI appetite booms
news_content:
Knowledge Atlas Technology JSC , also known as Zhipu AI, intends to apply for a domestic listing on the Shanghai Stock Exchange's Sci-Tech Innovation Board, the company said.

One of the leading players in China's crowded artificial intelligence sector, Zhipu AI, said late on Monday the proposed issuance of A shares, each with a nominal value of 0.10 yuan, would represent between 2 percent and 8 percent of the company's total share capital, or 9.1 million to 38.8 million shares.

However, it did not disclose the amount it plans to raise from the issue.

Zhipu raised HK$4.35 billion in a Hong Kong initial public offering in January. Its shares have since risen more than 10 times its IPO price of HK$116 per share.

The AI startup's A-share listing follows similar moves by its peers and other Chinese tech companies seeking to capitalise on buoyant investor appetite for AI-related stocks as Beijing pushes to fast-track tech listings.

China's tech-focused Star 50 Index is up 22 percent so far this year. 

Robotics firm Unitree obtained approval from the Shanghai Stock Exchange for an A-share IPO on Monday. It plans to raise 4.2 billion yuan in the offering, targeting a US$7 billion valuation, according to sources. Baidu's AI chip unit Kunlunxin, which filed confidentially for a Hong Kong IPO in January, has also started tutoring work in May for a domestic listing, regulatory disclosure showed.

As of May 22, proceeds raised via domestic IPOs in China amounted to US$6.7 billion, up 76 percent from the same period in 2025, LSEG data showed. 

Mega offerings by chip giants ChangXin Memory Technologies and Yangtze Memory Technologies are expected to further boost domestic capital markets this year.

Zhipu plans to issue the shares within 12 months of obtaining the registration document from the China Securities Regulatory Commission and will apply for listing and trading on the board upon completion of the issuance.

In addition, the company will change its English name from Knowledge Atlas Technology Joint Stock to Z.AI to align with its operational needs. (Reuters)



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: HK stocks jump up after cautious opening in region
news_content:
Asian stocks made a cautious start to trading on Tuesday as uncertainty over whether the ceasefire in the Middle East conflict would hold dampened renewed optimism around artificial intelligence.

In Hong Kong, the benchmark Hang Seng Index opened down three points at 25,395 before shooting up 349 points, or 1.38 percent, at 25,747 at one stage in mid-morning trading.

The China Enterprises Index was three points, or 0.04 percent, higher at 8,511 at the opening before, like the benchmark, jumping 177 points to 8,685 later.

The tech index was up 176 points, or 3.55 percent, at 5,141, at one stage in mid-morning trading after opening up 31 points, or 0.62 percent, at 4,995.

On the mainland, the Shanghai Composite Index opened up three points, or 0.09 percent, at 4,061.

The Shenzhen Component Index was up 70 points, or 0.46 percent, at 15,410 while the ChiNext Index was up 36 points, or 0.92 percent, at 3,987.

In Tokyo, the Nikkei's losses accelerated to 1,203 points, or 1.8 percent, to be at 65,730 at one stage before midday after opening for the day down 304 points, or 0.46 percent, at 66,629.

In Seoul, the Kospi plunged into the red to be 263 points, or 3 percent, at 8,524 at one stage before noon after opening up 94 points, or 1.08 percent, at 8,883.

"Conflicting news coming out of the Middle East left markets whipsawing, with Iran stating that negotiations with the US have been suspended, only for (US) President Donald Trump to follow up in recent hours with reassurances that talks are continuing 'at a rapid pace'," analysts from Westpac wrote in a research note.

Brent crude held steady around US$95 a barrel after Lebanon announced a partial ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel on Monday, which could clear the path for renewed efforts to end the three-month war between the United States and Iran.

"That the equity market is in boom mode is not up for debate," despite higher energy prices and surging real interest rates, said David Rosenberg, founder and president at Rosenberg Research in Toronto, in a note to clients. 

"The S&P 500 is now up nine weeks in a row, a streak we last witnessed in late 2023."

AI suppliers in Asia made gains after AI developer Anthropic said it had confidentially filed for a US initial public offering, which could draw a trillion-dollar valuation.

Alphabet shares slipped 0.7 percent after the tech giant said it is looking to raise US$80 billion in equity offerings, including an investment from Berkshire Hathaway, in an aggressive push to fund expansion of its AI infrastructure. (Xinhua & Reuters)



Edited by Raymond Yeung

title: 巴郡增持Alphabet　分析：新任行政總裁帶來新轉變
news_content:
巴郡兩日內投資168億美元，先後收購住宅建築商Taylor Morrison，以及增持Alphabet。有基金經理認為，巴郡新任行政總裁阿貝爾似乎正走出巴菲特的影子，展現自己的作為。

阿貝爾今年1月接替巴菲特，出任巴郡行政總裁，巴菲特擔任董事長。

截至今年3月底，巴郡持有3802億美元現金。不少投資者及分析員認為，現金過多已經對巴郡股價構成壓力，現時巴郡股價較去年5月的紀錄高位回落13%，同期標普500指數則上升34%。

巴郡周一公布，通過私募方式購入Alphabet價值100億美元股票，有別於以往巴菲特對投資科技股態度遲疑。而在周日，巴郡亦公布以68億美元，收購Taylor Morrison。



編輯：張詩民

title: 日股半日跌1.6%
news_content:
日本股市半日下跌，日經平均指數上午收市報65833點，跌1100點，跌幅1.64%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 黃色工作暑熱警告生效
news_content:
黃色工作暑熱警告生效，表示部分工作環境的熱壓力頗高。

勞工處提醒，僱主應參照勞工處的《預防工作時中暑指引》，在合理地切實可行的情況下採取所需的防暑措施，包括重新編排工作時段及提供適當的休息時間，減低僱員中暑風險。僱員如出現熱疾病的症狀，例如頭痛、頭暈、口渴、噁心，應立即到陰涼處休息和飲水，並通知僱主或主管。



編輯：方潤南

title: 孫玉菡：爭取約見未取出世紙男嬰父母　有機制保障兒童福利
news_content:
有報道指，一對港人父母早年在芬蘭誕下女兒，由於沒有出生證明，女兒其後被瑞典當地部門強制看管。兩人其後回港在家中誕下另一名兒子，但男嬰未領取出生證明。

勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡表示，政府高度關注事件，社署正積極跟進，由上星期四起，社署人員已用不同方法嘗試聯絡相關家庭，包括上門等候，但一直未能見到對方。直至昨日透過電郵聯絡到他們，社署正爭取約見兩人，最關心是男嬰的健康及安全。當局最大目標是希望可安排男嬰接受健康檢查及評估，如果相關家庭有任何意願，當局可提供適切支援。

孫玉菡強調，政府有整全的機制處理兒童福利，會以法、理、情原則盡快處理，適當時候會採取適當行動。他又說，有關男嬰出世紙的問題，入境處會跟進。至於對方希望政府協助其留在瑞典的女兒，孫玉菡說，入境處已透過外交部駐港公署，以及中國駐瑞典大使館跟進。



編輯：任順熙

title: 《環看天下》：以軍對黎巴嫩擴大軍事行動   多國表達憂慮
news_content:
中東局勢未見明顯緩和跡象。伊朗表示，由於以色列持續在黎巴嫩展開軍事行動，伊朗談判團隊暫停透過中間人與美國對話，並計劃徹底封鎖霍爾木茲海峽。

另一方面，以色列較早前證實進一步擴大在黎巴嫩境內的軍事行動。美國總統特朗普在社交媒體發文，說他分別與以色列和黎巴嫩真主黨溝通，以色列不會向黎巴嫩首都貝魯特派遣部隊，真主黨也同意停火。

有內地學者認為，同黎巴嫩真主黨同以色列衝突相關的擴散效應，不容忽視。

title: 韓國5月通脹率3.1%創逾兩年最高　中東戰事推高油價
news_content:
韓國統計廳數據顯示，5月消費者價格指數（CPI）按年升3.1%，創逾兩年最大升幅，高過市場預期，受中東戰事推高油價影響。

5月CPI按月升0.5%，高過預期。



編輯：張詩民

title: 滬指初段偏軟　創業板指數升近1%
news_content:
滬深股市初段個別發展。

上證綜合指數較早時報4052點，跌5點，跌幅0.13%。

深證成份指數報15354點，升14點。

創業板指數報3983點，升33點，升幅0.84%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 人行開展2億元人民幣逆回購　規模創逾11年以來最低
news_content:
人民銀行公開市場開展2億元人民幣7日期逆回購操作，單日操作規模創2015年初以來最低。利率維持1.4厘。

對沖到期量後，公開市場單日淨回籠2488億元人民幣，連續3日淨回籠。



編輯：宋家樑

title: Alphabet擬集資800億美元支持擴建AI基礎設施
news_content:
Google母公司Alphabet表示，計劃發售股份集資800億美元，以擴建人工智能（AI）基礎設施，其中著名投資旗艦巴郡將投資100億美元。

Alphabet將通過私募方式向巴郡出售股份，包括50億美元A類普通股及50億美元C類股份，每股作價分別為351.81美元和348.2美元，兩者價格都低於周一收市價。巴郡今次增持，擴大去年第3季以來的持股規模。

Alphabet亦計劃第3季按市價發售400億美元股份，將在一段時間內逐步在市場上出售A類和C類股票，以提高融資靈活性。


編輯：張詩民

title: Bus driver arrested after cyclist killed in Kwai Chung
news_content:
Police arrested a bus driver on suspicion of dangerous driving causing death after a cyclist was killed in an accident in Kwai Chung on Monday afternoon.

The driver, 60, is being detained.

Police received a report at about 2.50pm that a bus hit a man riding a bicycle while travelling along Tung Chi Street, turning right towards Shek Yam Road. 

The cyclist, 60, was said to be trapped under the bus before being extracted and rushed to hospital with multiple injuries. 

He was taken to Yan Chai Hospital in an unconscious state and later transferred to Princess Margaret Hospital. He was certified dead at 6:08pm. 

An investigation is underway and the police are calling for witnesses to come forward.


Edited by Nazvi Careem

title: SpaceX為特定員工及個人預留IPO股份5%　豁免禁售期
news_content:
外電引述監管文件顯示，SpaceX將在首次公開發行（IPO）中，預留5%股份按上市價出售予特定員工及個人，並豁免相關股份禁售期。文件內未有披露以上安排涉及股份數量，亦未有指明獲分配股份人士身分。

另外，路透報道，SpaceX計劃分階段解禁內部人士持股，解禁條件部分與公司業績及股價目標掛鈎，只要滿足特定條件，部分股東在公司上市後公布首季業績後不久，就可以開始出售持股，所有股份將在6個月後全部解禁。

SpaceX行政總裁馬斯克掌控公司85.1%表決權，並持有12.3%的A類股份。文件顯示，馬斯克已同意在公司上市後約1年內不出售持股。其他主要投資者亦需遵守為期1年的股份禁售期，但文件未有披露相關股份的規模。



編輯：張詩民

title: 意大利南部海域發生6.2級地震
news_content:
意大利南部海域發生6.2級地震，未有收到傷亡和重大財產損毀報告。

地震發生在當地星期二午夜過後，震央位於卡拉布里亞大區西北海岸附近海域，震源深度約250公里。

意大利國家地球物理與火山研究所說，地震震感範圍較廣，意大利南部多個地區民眾報告感受到震動。部分居民在地震發生後短暫離開住所，到室外避險。



編輯：方潤南

韓國股市在開市初段跌逾3%，首爾綜合指數低見8503點，其後跌幅收窄，較早時報8755點，跌33點，跌幅0.38%。

title: Alphabet to raise US$80 bn to fuel AI expansion
news_content:
Alphabet is looking to raise $80 billion in equity offerings, including an investment from Berkshire Hathaway, the Google parent said on Monday, in its aggressive push to fund a costly expansion of its AI infrastructure.

The deal brings in Warren Buffett's diversified holding company as a major new investor, adding a high-profile endorsement of Alphabet's long-term AI and cloud strategy.

Alphabet raised its annual capital spending forecast by US$5 billion to between US$180 billion and US$190 billion in April, ramping up investments to capture growing AI-driven computing demand with its business AI tools and custom chips.

The Google parent will sell US$10 billion worth of shares to Berkshire in a private placement, comprising US$5 billion in Class A common stock at US$351.81 per share and US$5 billion in Class C capital stock for US$348.20 per share, both below Monday's closing prices.

The company's shares were down 2 percent after the bell.

"All companies are thrilled when Berkshire takes positions, because it is the kind of shareholder that companies like to have," said Steven Check, president and chief investment officer of Check Capital Management, which has investments in Berkshire stock.

Berkshire's investment adds to the position it has built since third quarter last year. Last month, Berkshire said it more than tripled its stake in the Google parent, which at US$16.6 billion has become one of its largest common stock investments.

"This additional purchase underscores that Greg Abel(Berkshire CEO) believes that Alphabet will earn a reasonable return on its AI capex spending even with the firm issuing additional shares," said Bill Stone, chief investment officer at Glenview Trust Company.

Alphabet said it aims to raise US$30 billion through concurrent public offerings backed by investment banks, split evenly between depositary shares tied to mandatory convertible preferred stock and Class A and C shares.

In addition, the company expects to launch a US$40 billion at-the-market offering program in the third quarter, giving it flexibility to sell Class A and Class C stock gradually over time.

"The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company's available supply," Alphabet said.

Alphabet has raised more than US$85 billion in debt across six currencies and markets over the last year, bringing its total debt balance to over US$100 billion, the company said. (Reuters)



Edited by Cecil Wong

title: 莎芭蓮卡擊敗大坂直美　晉級法網女單八強
news_content:
法國網球公開賽，「一姐」莎芭蓮卡直落兩盤擊敗「前一姐」大坂直美，打入女單八強。

首盤大坂直美一開始就打破莎芭蓮卡的發球局，領先2:0。但28歲的莎芭蓮卡企穩陣腳後，以出色的發球取回優勢，在第11局作出關鍵破發，以7:5先拔頭籌。

莎芭蓮卡全場12次發球直接得分，第一發球得分率達83%，在第二盤再贏6:3，用了1小時26分鐘，贏盤數2:0晉級。

莎芭蓮卡賽後說，感謝在場觀眾營造美妙的氣氛。又讚揚大坂直美是非常優秀的球手，要贏她非常艱難，表示滿意自己的發球能夠給予對方壓力。

而另一位「前一姐」莎蓮娜威廉絲掛拍近四年後宣布復出。

23項大滿貫得主，44歲的「細威」獲發「外卡」，參加皇后盃網球賽。兩孩之母的「細威」在社交平台上載在球場上訓練的片段，並寫上「好消息傳播得很快」。

英國傳媒報道，「細威」可能會夥拍19歲的加拿大新星晏寶高，參加女雙比賽。



編輯：方潤南

title: AI giant Anthropic confidentially files for IPO
news_content:
AI giant Anthropic, the maker of the Claude chatbot, announced on Monday that it had filed confidentially for an initial public offering (IPO), as Silicon Valley AI companies look to raise the enormous sums needed to fuel the sector's rapid expansion.

A confidential filing lets a company submit its IPO paperwork to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for review without making its financials and business details public until much later in the process.

"This gives us the option to go public after the Securities and Exchange Commission completes its review," the company said in a statement. "The proposed initial public offering will depend on market conditions and other factors."

"The number of shares to be offered and the price have not yet been set," the company added.

The filing came just days after the company said it raised US$65 billion in a new funding round that valued the OpenAI rival at US$965 billion, putting it on the cusp of a trillion-dollar valuation.

The latest fundraising round confirmed Anthropic's place as one of the most significant players in AI, having built its reputation by focusing on delivering generative AI to enterprise clients.

Anthropic's valuation puts it ahead of OpenAI, which was valued at US$852 billion in March and is also aiming to go public, with a filing expected imminently.

Asked by CNBC about his own company's IPO efforts, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said that "going public is a financing event. I don't think that's one that we're focused on."

"I assume we'll do it (at some point)," Altman added.

Founded in 2021 by siblings Dario and Daniela Amodei and other former executives at OpenAI, Anthropic has positioned itself as a safety-focused alternative in the AI race.

Claude Code, its coding assistant for developers, has become one of its most popular products, helping push its projected annual revenue to US$47 billion. Anthropic's commercial success has been accompanied by difficulties meeting demand for computing power, amid a shortage of chips and servers.

In recent months, the company has faced criticism from users complaining that they were exhausting their usage quotas too quickly and having to pay high prices to continue. In response, Anthropic has struck deals to secure several gigawatts of computing capacity from Amazon, Google and Broadcom.

Last month, the company signed a surprise agreement with tech billionaire Elon Musk. Musk, who is embroiled in a legal battle against the founders of OpenAI, is leasing access to his Colossus data centers to Anthropic for US$1.25 billion per month.

Located in Memphis, Tennessee, the facility had been underutilised by his xAI lab, the creator of the Grok chatbot.

Anthropic and OpenAI's IPOs would likely follow Elon Musk's SpaceX to Wall Street. SpaceX, which absorbed Musk's AI company xAI, could see shares begin trading as early as June 12. 

The company is targeting a valuation of approximately US$1.75 trillion in what would be the largest IPO in history.

"We believe this represents an opening of the floodgates for the IPO market, which has been relatively dormant for a few years," said Dan Ives of Wedbush Securities.

Anthropic's IPO filing comes as it navigates a legal dispute with the Pentagon, which designated the company a supply chain risk after it refused to grant the military unfettered access to its AI models. Anthropic called the Defense Department's move unconstitutional retaliation. (AFP)



Edited by Cecil Wong

title: US stocks edge up, oil jumps as Iran talks stall again
news_content:
Oil prices jumped and equities hit records on Monday as Middle East peace talks stumbled, while Lebanese authorities said Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a "mutual cessation of attacks."

Crude futures shot around seven percent higher after an Iranian state news agency announced Tehran had suspended its negotiations with Washington via mediators.

International benchmark Brent closed 4.2 percent higher while its US counterpart, the West Texas Intermediate, added 5.5 percent.

The United States and Iran had traded strikes over the weekend and Tehran insisted that any deal to end the war must cover Israel's escalating offensive into Lebanon.

The Tasnim news agency report cited the breakdown of the ceasefire and clashes in Lebanon as the reasons for the halt in dialogue.

"Hopes of further progress in US-Iran talks have been dashed," said Chris Beauchamp, chief market analyst at online trading and investing platform IG.

"This has duly resulted in a spike for oil prices, since the combination of this and the weekend's exchange of fire dramatically raises the chances of a fresh round of conflict," he added.

On Monday afternoon however, Lebanon's US embassy said that Hezbollah had accepted a US proposal for a "mutual cessation of attacks," after Israel threatened more strikes on south Beirut on the eve of further Israel-Lebanon talks.

After the United States and Israel launched strikes on Iran at the end of February, Iran effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas normally flows.

A ceasefire has largely held since mid-April, but traffic through the strait has been scant and negotiations have dragged on.

"Markets know that oil stockpiles are being rapidly run down, and the rosy assumptions around the renewal of supplies involved the strait being open by June," said Beauchamp.

Still, Wall Street's three main indices closed at records on Monday, buoyed by the tech sector as Nvidia shares bounced 6.3 percent.

The company earlier unveiled a powerful laptop chip for Windows machines, staking its claim in the market for next-generation consumer PCs integrated with artificial intelligence.

Shares in Dell Technologies also climbed by 10.7 percent, while HP rose 8.5 percent.

Christopher Low of FHN Financial added that despite the lack of progress on the Middle East war, "negotiators on both sides insist they very much want a deal."

News on the US proposal was likely also seen as a positive development.

"Investors continue to embrace the AI boom," said independent markets analyst Stephen Innes.

Investor enthusiasm for AI-related stocks has helped drive stock exchanges to record highs in recent weeks despite the war, which has sparked inflation as energy prices soar.

Europe's main equity markets closed lower, while the dollar firmed against its main rivals. 

The S&P 500 rose 0.3 percent, to 7,599, the Nasdaq rose 0.4 percent, to 27,086, while the Dow rose 0.1 percent, to 51,078. (AFP)



Edited by Cecil Wong

title: 伊朗指暫停與美國對話　特朗普指無收到消息　料一周內達成協議
news_content:
伊朗表示，由於以色列持續展開軍事行動，因此伊朗暫停透過中間人與美國對話，又揚言徹底封鎖霍爾木茲海峽。

不過美國總統特朗普說，美方沒有收到伊方有關暫停談判的消息，又預計美伊一星期內可以達成協議。

特朗普又說，他分別與以色列和黎巴嫩真主黨溝通，以色列承諾不向黎巴嫩首都貝魯特派遣部隊，真主黨也同意停火。

以色列總理內塔尼亞胡表示，如果真主黨持續襲擊以方城鎮，以軍仍會襲擊貝魯特；黎巴嫩政府就說，收到真主黨確認，同意與以色列停火。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 港股ADR與本港收市比較個別發展
news_content:
港股美國預託證券（ADR）與本港收市比較個別發展。

金融股方面，滙控ADR較本港收市跌約0.2%，折合報約146港元。友邦和港交所ADR都較本港收市跌約0.4%。

至於科技股，美團和京東ADR較本港收市升近1%或以上，騰訊跌約0.6%。

聯想集團ADR較本港收市升逾4%。Nvidia行政總裁黃仁勳表示，包括聯想在內的個人電腦製造商，將於今年秋季起推出搭載Nvidia全新晶片的AI個人電腦。



編輯：張詩民

title: 中美日前舉行年度海上軍事安全磋商機制工作小組會議
news_content:
中美兩軍上星期四至五，在美國夏威夷舉行年度中美海上軍事安全磋商機制工作小組會議。

解放軍海軍在官方微信公眾號公布，雙方以構建中美建設性戰略穩定關係重要共識為引領，在平等和尊重基礎上，就當前中美海空安全形勢進行坦誠、建設性交流，討論改進中美海上軍事安全問題的措施。

解放軍又說，中方堅決反對以航行和飛越自由為名，危害中國主權和安全；反對針對中方的侵權挑釁和抵近偵察滋擾，將繼續依法依規堅定維護國家領土主權和海洋權益，維護地區和平繁榮。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 韓華航空航天公司工廠爆炸　集團成立特別應對工作小組善後
news_content:
韓國韓華航空航天公司位於大田市的工廠，昨日上午發生爆炸，造成5死2傷。

韓國檢方和警方成立專項調查組，調查事故，大田地方檢察廳表示，將與有關部門合作，查明事故原因和責任歸屬。

韓華集團發聲明，對於有員工在爆炸中傷亡，表示深切哀悼，向遺屬及國民道歉。集團會長金昇淵指示公司組建特別應對工作小組，做好事故善後工作。聲明說，韓華集團和韓華航空航天公司正了解事故原因，確認情況後將會對外公布，承諾確保類似事故不再發生。

事發在當地昨日早上約11時，事故導致一棟建築面積544平方米的單層廠房完全燒毀。當局說，事發時共有7名工人進行火藥相關清洗工序，其中5人當場證實遇難。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 特朗普分別與以色列及真主黨溝通　稱雙方均同意停止攻擊
news_content:
伊朗表示，由於以色列持續在黎巴嫩展開軍事行動，伊朗談判團隊暫停透過中間人與美國對話，並計劃徹底封鎖霍爾木茲海峽。

美國總統特朗普表示，暫時沒有收到伊朗方面有關暫停談判的消息，美國將繼續對伊朗港口實施封鎖。特朗普接受美國全國廣播公司訪問時又說，維持港口封鎖並不代表美國會在當地大肆投擲炸彈。

特朗普又在社交媒體發文，說他分別與以色列和黎巴嫩真主黨溝通，以色列不會向黎巴嫩首都貝魯特派遣部隊，真主黨也同意停火。

特朗普說，他與以色列總理內塔尼亞胡通話，以色列確認不會派部隊前往貝魯特，也已經撤回正在途中的部隊。特朗普又說，他透過高級別代表居中協調，與真主黨方面進行了一次很好的溝通，對方同意停止所有的攻擊。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 韓正晤巴西外長　強調要更好發揮中巴高委會等機制作用
news_content:
國家副主席韓正，在北京與巴西外長維埃拉會面。

韓正表示，中方始終從戰略高度和長遠角度看待和發展中巴關係，中方願與巴方落實好兩國元首重要共識，推進高水平戰略協作，為維護廣大發展中國家利益、推動共同發展，展現大國擔當。

韓正說，中巴務實合作互補性強、內生動力強勁，雙方要更好發揮中巴高委會等機制作用，推動合作朝著更高科技含量、更大附加值和更強戰略性方向邁進。

中方引述維埃拉表示，當前多邊主義遭受前所未有的打擊，巴中深化命運共同體建設尤其重要，巴方願與中方共同發揮高委會協調作用，深化各領域合作。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 中國巴西舉行外長級全面戰略對話　王毅指雙方要共同抵禦外部挑戰
news_content:
外長王毅昨日在北京，與到訪的巴西外長維埃拉，舉行第五次中巴外長級全面戰略對話。

王毅說，近年中巴關係實現從全面戰略夥伴到命運共同體的里程碑式跨越，各領域務實合作不斷提質升級，兩國人民相互走近。中巴雙方要落實好元首重要共識，持續深化命運共同體建設，共同抵禦外部挑戰。

王毅又說，中方始終是拉美和加勒比國家可靠的朋友，願與巴方在內的地區國家一起，促進中拉整體合作繼續發展。

中方引述維埃拉表示，巴中關係是發展中國家堅持獨立自主、加強團結協作的標桿，也是大國之間發展穩定、可預期關係的典範。巴方願與中方加強多邊協作，共同推進全球治理體系改革，維護聯合國權威，促進國際公平正義。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 警方跟進調查昨日葵涌交通意外　巴士司機涉危駕致他人死亡被捕
news_content:
葵涌昨日下午發生致命交通意外，一名60歲男子死亡。

警方表示，昨日下午近3時接獲報案，指一名男子駕駛一輛巴士，沿童子街右轉往石蔭路方向行駛，駛至石蔭路116號對開時，據報撞倒一名60歲、踏單車的男子。

警方說，該名踏單車的男子被困巴士車底，由消防員救出，他身體多處嚴重受傷，昏迷送往仁濟醫院，其後轉送瑪嘉烈醫院，於同日傍晚6時許證實死亡。

該名60歲巴士司機涉嫌危險駕駛引致他人死亡被捕，案件由新界南總區交通部特別調查隊第一隊跟進調查，警方呼籲任何人如目睹意外發生或有資料提供，可與調查人員聯絡。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 國家衛健委專家組前往剛果民主共和國　支援伊波拉疫情防控工作
news_content:
國家衛健委的抗疫醫療首批專家組，今天凌晨從北京啟程前往剛果民主共和國，支援當地的伊波拉疫情防控工作。

世衛上月中宣布，剛果民主共和國的伊波拉疫情，構成國際關注的突發公共衛生事件。中方表示，為弘揚國際團結抗疫精神，決定選派高水平抗疫醫療專家組到當地支援。專家組成員均有豐富疫情防控經驗，融合公共衛生、中西醫診療專業力量，將聯同當地醫療隊支援疫情防控，並推動兩地醫療、疾控機構的合作。

國家衛健委負責人表示，選派高水平抗疫醫療專家組，到剛果民主共和國支援，充分體現中國參與國際行動、攜手各國共抗疫情的擔當。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 王毅冀中俄專家學者深入交流　賦能兩國戰略協作高質量發展
news_content:
中共中央政治局委員、外長王毅向中俄智庫高端論壇致賀信。
　　
王毅表示，今年是中俄戰略協作伙伴關係建立30周年和《中俄睦鄰友好合作條約》簽署25周年，兩國不斷深化戰略協作，務實合作量質齊升。中俄始終堅定維護以聯合國為核心的國際體系、以國際法為基礎的國際秩序，倡導平等有序的世界多極化，推動構建更公正合理的全球治理體系，為國際社會注入更多穩定性、建設性和合作性力量。

王毅指出，中俄智庫高端論壇是兩國之間層次最高、覆蓋面最廣、影響力最大的智庫交流平台，他希望兩國專家學者深入交流，賦能兩國戰略協作高質量發展。




編輯：許敬軒

title: 葵涌踏單車男子遭巴士撞倒不治　九巴司機涉危駕致他人死亡被捕
news_content:
在葵涌踏單車時被巴士撞倒的60歲男子，延至傍晚約6時許離世。九巴司機涉嫌危險駕駛引致他人死亡被捕。

事發在下午近三時，一輛九巴沿葵涌童子街轉入石蔭路時，懷疑撞向正踏單車的60歲男子，該男子被困車底。

消防人員將傷者救出，他身體多處受傷，昏迷送往仁濟醫院，之後再轉送瑪嘉烈醫院治理，其後傷重不治。同樣60歲的九巴司機被捕。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 四個地點咪錶試驗安裝感測器　記錄泊車位佔用狀況或物件
news_content:
運輸署公布，為提升停車收費錶的服務，7月2日起，將於四個指定地點展開為期6個月的新感測器試驗計劃，在現有「咪錶」的正下方安裝感測器。試驗地點包括柴灣吉勝街、土瓜灣長寧街、土瓜灣新碼頭街，以及荃灣路德圍。

署方表示，感測器將全日24小時運作，記錄「咪錶」位的使用狀況或佔用「咪錶」位的物件，電腦系統會利用收集到的數據，以人工智能技術分析物件的類別，不會影響駕駛人士正常使用「咪錶」及繳費。

署方說，這次試驗主要為評估新感測器的運作表現與技術可行性，以加強咪錶位實時使用狀況的準確性，讓駕駛人士能獲取更準確的泊車位資訊，政府部門亦可更全面掌握「咪錶」位的佔用情況及作出跟進。感測器只會收集泊車位的佔用狀況或物件，不會記錄任何車輛登記號碼或人臉，收集的數據將加密處理。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: 海關偵破三宗懷疑非法進口動物　涉及活貓倉鼠及雀鳥
news_content:
海關在落馬洲支線管制站及深圳灣管制站，共偵破三宗懷疑非法進口動物案件，涉及活貓、活倉鼠及活雀鳥，三宗案件各有一名抵港男旅客被捕。

海關人員在落馬洲支線管制站入境大堂截查一名33歲抵港男旅客，在他個人行李內檢獲裝載於鳥籠的150隻懷疑非法進口活雀鳥，估計市值約三萬元。該名男子隨即被捕。同樣在落馬洲支線管制站，海關人員在一名66歲抵港男旅客背包檢獲一隻活貓，估計市值約兩萬元，該男子被捕。

另一宗懷疑非法進口動物案件則在深圳灣管制站發現，一名50歲抵港男旅客的背包，被檢獲兩隻活倉鼠，估計市值共約40元。三宗案件均已轉交漁護署跟進調查。



編輯：鍾慧儀

title: MOUs signed during Lee's visit to Kazakhstan
news_content:
Chief Executive John Lee on Monday witnessed the signing of a number of memoranda of understanding on his first full day of visit to Kazakhstan.

The MOUs were signed during Lee's tour of the Astana Hub – Kazakhstan’s premier technology and innovation park – and the Astana International Financial Centre (AIFC).

These included an agreement between Hong Kong’s Belt and Road Office and Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Development; separate deals between the Astana Hub and Cyberport, Hong Kong Science and Technology Parks and the Hong Kong-Shenzhen Innovation and Technology Park; as well as an agreement between InvestHK and the AIFC.

The chief executive met with Deputy Kazakh Prime Minister and Minister of Artificial Intelligence and Digital Development Zhaslan Madiyev at the Astana Hub.

Noting that 2026 has been designated Kazakhstan’s “Year of Digitalisation and Artificial Intelligence,” Lee described the Astana Hub as a regional innovation cluster and invited Kazakh tech firms to consider setting up operations in Hong Kong. 

He outlined Hong Kong’s own I&T ambitions, pointing to global digital competitiveness rankings and the Shenzhen-Hong Kong-Guangzhou innovation cluster. 

The CE highlighted infrastructure projects in the Northern Metropolis that aim to deepen industry-research integration.

Lee also visited the AIFC where he met with its governor, Renat Bekturov. 

The day was packed with other high-level meetings and site visits as Hong Kong pushes to deepen economic, financial and innovation ties with Central Asia.

Lee met with President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, who reiterated Kazakhstan's role as a gateway on the Belt and Road and stressed Hong Kong’s ability to connect the mainland with global markets. 

Noting that Kazakhstan is Hong Kong’s largest trading partner in Central Asia, the chief executive emphasised mutual opportunities stemming from the country’s push to diversify its economy.

Lee also held talks with Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of National Economy Serik Zhumangarin, where the two sides exchanged views on deepening economic cooperation. 

Joining the chief executive's delegation is a Henan firm that specialises in mining development and trading of mineral products and is among the mainland enterprises seeking closer ties with Kazakhstan. 

Speaking at an exchange session, Henan Yudi Technology Group chairman and party committee secretary Yu Jiyun said his company has taken part in geological exploration projects in Kazakhstan and Uzbekistan, and it wants to further boost cooperation with Kazakhstan because it doesn't have mining rights there.

"Kazakhstan has rich mineral resources and offers vast development opportunities. Also, Kazakhstan is closely connected with China’s Xinjiang. Cooperation between the two sides offers natural geographical advantages."


Edited by Edmond Fong
